Cá nhân.description: Cá nhân refers to an individual who has the right to request changes to their name or ethnicity under certain conditions.<SEP>Cá nhân refers to an individual person, who has rights such as birth registration, nationality, image rights, and the right to life and safety.<SEP>Individuals are subjects of civil law with rights and obligations.<SEP>Cá nhân refers to an individual who can be a legal representative or can designate a representative for civil transactions.

Cơ quan nhà nước có thẩm quyền.entity_id: Cơ quan nhà nước có thẩm quyền
Cơ quan nhà nước có thẩm quyền.description: Cơ quan nhà nước có thẩm quyền refers to authorized government agencies in Vietnam that possess broad legal authority to make decisions on various civil and legal matters. These agencies have the power to recognize changes in names or ethnicities, make legally binding decisions regarding civil rights and obligations, and enforce decisions on legal matters. They also have the authority to require the removal of trees or structures that pose a risk, enforce the cessation of infringement and restoration of the original state of property, and make decisions regarding ownership and property division. Additionally, Cơ quan nhà nước có thẩm quyền is responsible for managing estates when heirs have not been identified and for overseeing and regulating corporate activities.

Tòa án.description:
Tòa án, which refers to the court system in Vietnam, plays a crucial role in the judicial system. It is responsible for making decisions on a wide range of legal matters, including the use of images, missing persons, divorce, and declaring death. Tòa án acts as a legal authority that respects and protects the civil rights of individuals and legal entities. It manages the assets of a missing person and can declare a person missing. Additionally, Tòa án makes decisions regarding the rights and responsibilities of guardians and can appoint a guardian in case of disputes or if there is no natural guardian.

Tòa án resolves civil cases and civil matters to protect rights and legal interests. It is the judicial body responsible for declaring a person dead and for revoking such a declaration. It also has the authority to declare civil transactions as invalid and recognize the validity of certain civil transactions. Tòa án makes decisions regarding legal matters, such as declaring civil transactions invalid or designating legal representatives. It is an organization that has the authority to designate legal representatives in various circumstances and makes decisions regarding the division of shared property. Furthermore, Tòa án makes decisions regarding the handling of assets to fulfill the obligations of the owner. It can be requested to enforce the cessation of infringement and restoration of the original state of the property. Tòa án resolves disputes and enforces the terms of contracts. It can decide on the modification or termination of a contract in the event of a fundamental change in circumstances. Tòa án is the court that resolves contract disputes and is where legal representatives can represent the company.

Tòa án can extend the time limit for dividing an estate if it affects the family's livelihood. It is the court that can issue decisions affecting business registration content and is responsible for making decisions that can lead to changes in the content of the Certificate of Business Registration. Tòa án is the judicial body that declares a member missing or incapacitated and issues decisions regarding the cessation of business activities. It can also issue restrictions on individuals' ability to hold positions or engage in certain activities and can make decisions regarding the prohibition of individuals or entities from certain activities or businesses. Tòa án is a judicial body that can make decisions regarding the validity of company resolutions and the transfer of shares. It is responsible for hearing and deciding legal cases related to the company's management and operations, including the validity of resolutions passed by the Đại hội đồng cổ đông. Shareholders can approach Tòa án to review and potentially annul a resolution of the General Shareholders' Meeting. Tòa án also has authority over arbitration activities and can be appealed to for resolving disputes if the arbitration agreement is deemed invalid or unenforceable. It can issue a decision that leads to the dissolution of a business and can make decisions regarding the revocation of business registration certificates. Tòa án can be requested to summon witnesses and apply emergency measures and can make decisions regarding the jurisdiction of disputes.<SEP>Tòa án is the court system responsible for enforcing and reviewing arbitration decisions.<SEP>Tòa án is an organization where a person can file a lawsuit for compensation if they are damaged by the application of emergency measures.

Việt Nam.description: Việt Nam refers to the country of Vietnam, where the laws and regulations mentioned in the text are applicable. It is a country where the legal framework and civil transactions are governed, and where legal representatives must reside. The legal provisions for individuals and legal entities are applied in Việt Nam, including laws regarding di chúc (will) and hợp đồng (contract). The main office of a business entity is located in Việt Nam, and the Chairman of the company must obtain permission before leaving the country for more than 30 days. Additionally, more than half of the kiểm soát viên (supervisors) must reside in Việt Nam. These regulations and legal requirements form the comprehensive legal landscape of the country.<SEP>The country where the branch of the parent company is located.<SEP>Việt Nam is the country where the arbitration decisions may be made or recognized.<SEP>Việt Nam is the country where the legal framework and arbitration processes are applied.<SEP>Việt Nam is the country where the arbitration proceedings can take place.

Tòa Án.description:
Tòa Án is a judicial body in Vietnam responsible for legal proceedings and decisions. It serves as a court that can rule on various matters, including the protection of an individual's reputation and dignity, the appointment of guardians and supervisors, and disputes regarding pathways and drainage systems. Tòa Án plays a crucial role in the Vietnamese legal system by providing a framework for resolving a wide range of legal disputes and ensuring justice is served.

Tòa Án also resolves disputes related to collateral and the interpretation of a will. It has the authority to declare a person dead and to designate legal representatives to participate in legal proceedings. In cases where the division of an estate affects the living conditions of the surviving spouse or family, Tòa Án may be involved in determining the division. Additionally, Tòa Án can be requested to invalidate decisions made by the Hội Đồng Thành Viên if they do not comply with the law or the company's charter. The court also has the authority to prohibit individuals from practicing certain professions or engaging in specific business activities.<SEP>Tòa Án is the court that can issue a judgment affecting the transfer of private bonds.<SEP>Tòa Án is the court that can be requested by shareholders to stop or revoke resolutions or decisions.<SEP>Tòa Án is a judicial body that can be requested to invalidate a resolution of the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông.<SEP>The court has the authority to prohibit an owner of a private enterprise from practicing or engaging in certain activities within the scope of the business.<SEP>Tòa Án is the court that has the authority to apply, change, or cancel emergency measures.<SEP>Tòa Án is the court where the arbitration decision can be registered.

Bộ luật này.description: Bộ luật này refers to the legal code being discussed, which encompasses a wide range of provisions and regulations. This Civil Code defines the legal status, legal standards for behavior, rights, and obligations of individuals and legal entities in civil relations. It includes provisions for managing the assets of a missing person, the application of time limits, and the formation of legal entities. Additionally, Bộ luật này covers shared property ownership and management, and it contains specific provisions such as Điều 219, Điều 220, and others. The legal document also includes regulations and rules related to collateral and its management, providing a comprehensive framework for various civil and legal matters.<SEP>Bộ luật này refers to the legal code that governs the conditions for contract termination and the responsibilities of the parties involved.<SEP>This law refers to the legal document containing the articles and clauses related to performing work without authorization.

Tài Sản.description:
Tài Sản refers to assets or property that can be owned by individuals or entities. These assets can range from movable and immovable property to investments of enterprises and their owners, which are protected by law and cannot be nationalized or confiscated without proper compensation. Tài Sản can be subject to various legal conditions, including those that terminate ownership rights, such as during the termination of guardianship. It can also be owned jointly and is often the subject of the right to use. Tài Sản is involved in various legal transactions, including leasing, ownership retention, and guarantees, and can be subject to specific conditions and obligations in these transactions.

Tài Sản encompasses a wide range of goods or property that can be bought and sold under contracts. It can also refer to assets being transported, which have specific conditions and responsibilities associated with their transport. Additionally, Tài Sản can be lent under a Hợp đồng mượn tài sản, which includes all non-consumable assets. These assets are also involved in legal provisions and can be inherited. Furthermore, Tài Sản refers to property that is possessed, used, or benefited from without legal basis and must be returned to the rightful owner. The legal status of Tài Sản is determined by the laws of the country where the assets are located.<SEP>Tài Sản refers to the assets of the company, which can be sold or restructured.

Người Thừa Kế.description: Người Thừa Kế refers to an individual who inherits assets, property, or a portion of an estate upon the death of the person under guardianship or the owner of the property. This inheritance can be specified in a will or determined by law. The term also encompasses the rights and responsibilities that come with inheriting property, including gaining ownership rights and potentially becoming a member or owner of a company or private enterprise. In some cases, multiple heirs may inherit parts of the estate and may have agreements on how to divide it.<SEP>Người Thừa Kế refers to the heir of a deceased member who can inherit the member's share of the company's assets and potentially become a new member if approved by the board.

Người Quản Lý Di Sản.description: Người Quản Lý Di Sản is a person responsible for managing the estate of the deceased person under guardianship.

Người giám hộ.description: Người giám hộ is responsible for managing the affairs of a person who lacks civil capacity or has difficulties in perception and behavior.<SEP>A guardian who is responsible for the care and management of a person who has lost their civil capacity.<SEP>Người giám hộ refers to a guardian who is a legal representative for those under guardianship.<SEP>Người giám hộ is a guardian who can be designated as a legal representative for individuals with difficulties in perception and behavior.

Người được giám hộ.description: Người được giám hộ is the individual under the guardianship of another person, who lacks civil capacity or has difficulties in perception and behavior.<SEP>A person under guardianship who has lost their civil capacity.

Điều 57.description: Điều 57 outlines the obligations of a guardian towards a person who lacks civil capacity or has difficulties in perception and behavior.<SEP>Điều 57 is a specific article or section within the legal document that outlines the procedures for convening meetings of the company's governing body.<SEP>Điều 57 is a legal provision that describes the process for postponing dispute resolution proceedings.

Luật.description:
Luật is a comprehensive legal framework in Vietnam that governs various aspects of business operations, rights, and responsibilities. It defines the rights and obligations of enterprises, their owners, and the state, ensuring that all parties are governed by established rules and regulations. This legal framework covers the rights and responsibilities of members within a company, including the procedures for maintaining the Sổ Đăng Ký Thành Viên, which is the register of company members. Additionally, Luật regulates the operations and meetings of the company's governing body, ensuring that all activities are conducted in accordance with legal standards.

Luật also governs the naming of businesses, setting out regulations on prohibited names and overlapping names to prevent confusion and protect the interests of all parties. It addresses the regulation of gender transition and the protection of personal privacy, indicating its broad scope in safeguarding individual rights. In the context of enterprises providing public interest products and services, Luật specifies the rights and obligations of such enterprises and social enterprises, ensuring they operate in a manner that benefits the public and adheres to legal requirements.

Furthermore, Luật encompasses the legal framework governing the operations and regulations of corporations, including provisions for reducing registered capital, the repurchase and payment of shares, and the conditions under which shares can be transferred. It also regulates the roles within a company, the rights and obligations of shareholders, and the responsibilities of companies towards the state and their members. Additionally, Luật provides specific regulations for the qualifications and conditions of board members, including those for state-owned enterprises, and outlines the standards and conditions for the position of Kiểm soát viên.

Overall, Luật serves as a comprehensive legal framework that supports the efficient and lawful operation of businesses and protects the rights of individuals and entities within the Vietnamese legal system.<SEP>The law refers to the legal framework that governs the registration and operation of private enterprises and economic groups.<SEP>Luật refers to the legal regulations that govern the actions and responsibilities of parent and subsidiary companies.<SEP>Luật refers to the law that governs the rights and obligations of the members in the company.<SEP>Luật refers to the law that contains the regulations and provisions for the establishment and operation of businesses.<SEP>Luật refers to the legal framework governing the procedures for enforcing and challenging arbitration decisions.

Quyền Nhân Thân.description: Quyền nhân thân refers to personal rights that are aligned with the gender an individual has transitioned to, as regulated by the law.

Hợp Đồng.description: Hợp Đồng refers to a legal agreement that establishes the terms and conditions between parties. It can include various elements such as the subject, quantity, quality, price, payment method, performance period, location, execution method, rights and obligations of the parties, liability for breach, and dispute resolution methods. Hợp Đồng is a mutual agreement that can be used to establish, change, or terminate civil rights and obligations. It is commonly used in transactions between a buyer and a seller, where the buyer has the right to cancel the contract if the seller fails to fulfill their obligations. Additionally, Hợp Đồng can also refer to a lease agreement that outlines the rights and obligations of both the tenant and the landlord, including the terms of the lease and the conditions for termination. Parties involved in a Hợp Đồng are not allowed to disclose personal or family secrets learned during the contract process without mutual agreement. The applicable law for a Hợp Đồng is determined by the law of the country with the closest connection to the contract.<SEP>Contracts between the company and its owner or related individuals must be recorded and kept as a separate file of the company.

Quan Hệ Dân Sự.description: Quan hệ dân sự refers to civil relationships where changes in residence must be communicated to the other party if it affects rights and obligations.

Pháp Nhân.description: Pháp Nhân refers to legal entities that can act as guardians and must meet certain conditions to do so.<SEP>Pháp Nhân is a legal entity that must have a charter, a name in Vietnamese, a headquarters, and other organizational structures as defined by the law.<SEP>Pháp Nhân refers to legal entities that can be transformed into different forms, dissolved, or declared bankrupt according to the regulations.<SEP>Pháp Nhân is a legal entity established by the state and is not responsible for civil obligations arising from the state's civil relations.<SEP>Legal entities whose legal status and activities are governed by the laws of the country where they are established.

Người đại diện theo pháp luật.description: Người đại diện theo pháp luật is a legal representative who acts on behalf of individuals with limited or no legal capacity, as well as a legal representative designated for a legal entity or an individual by the entity, by law, or by the court. In the context of business entities, Người đại diện theo pháp luật acts on behalf of the company in various legal and administrative matters. This role includes signing the amended company charter for various types of companies and being included in the Certificate of Business Registration for limited liability companies or joint-stock companies. The legal representative is responsible for ensuring the company's legal interests and adhering to the law and the company's charter.<SEP>Người đại diện theo pháp luật is the legal representative of the company, responsible for ensuring the accuracy and timeliness of the information published.<SEP>Người đại diện theo pháp luật is the legal representative who has the right to demand the company to stop using the name of a former member.

Người từ đủ mười lăm tuổi đến chưa đủ mư.description: Người từ đủ mười lăm tuổi đến chưa đủ mười tám tuổi refers to individuals between the ages of 15 and 18 who can independently engage in civil transactions, except for certain types of transactions.

Người đại diện.description: Người đại diện refers to a legal representative who acts on behalf of another person or entity for civil transactions. This individual or entity is authorized to conduct such transactions on behalf of another party, including those who are not fully capable of civil conduct due to restrictions or incapacitation. The role of Người đại diện can be assumed by either an individual or a legal entity, and they can act either by legal authority or by specific authorization. In cases where the original person dies, the Người đại diện may take over the work performed on behalf of the original individual. This role is crucial in ensuring that civil transactions can be carried out effectively and legally on behalf of those who are unable to do so themselves.

Định đoạt tài sản chung.description: Định đoạt tài sản chung is the concept of disposing of shared property collectively by all owners.

Chủ sở hữu.description: Chủ sở hữu refers to the owner of a property or asset who holds rights and responsibilities over it. This includes the right to demand the return of the asset from unlawful possessors and the ability to decide to sell the property through an auction. In the context of a company, the Chủ sở hữu is the owner who appoints a representative to act on their behalf and is responsible for signing the amended company charter for a one-member limited liability company. Additionally, the owner is involved in the valuation of assets contributed to capital. The term also applies to mixed collective ownership of property, where owners from different economic sectors contribute to a common asset. Overall, the Chủ sở hữu has rights over the produce or income from the property and is responsible for its management and disposition.

Chủ sở hữu chung.description: Quản lý tài sản chung is the concept of managing shared property collectively by all owners.<SEP>Chủ sở hữu chung refers to joint owners of a property.<SEP>Chủ sở hữu chung refers to co-owners of property who must agree to sell it through an auction.

Điều 223.description: Điều 223 is a legal provision that establishes ownership rights through contracts such as purchase, gift, exchange, loan, or other ownership transfer agreements.<SEP>Đиều 223 is a legal provision that establishes ownership rights through contracts.

Điều 224.description: Điều 224 is a legal provision that establishes ownership rights over the produce or income from a property, according to agreements or legal provisions, starting from the time the produce or income is obtained.

Điều 226.description: Điều 226 is a legal provision that establishes ownership rights in cases of mixing assets, detailing the rights and obligations of the owners involved.

Người sử dụng tài sản.description: Người sử dụng tài sản refers to the user of a property who has rights over the produce or income from the property.<SEP>Người sử dụng tài sản refers to individuals who use a property or asset, whether legally or unlawfully.

Người được giao tài sản.description: Người được giao tài sản refers to the person who receives property through a contract and gains ownership rights over it.

Người sáp nhập tài sản.description: Người sáp nhập tài sản refers to the person who merges their property with another's, creating new ownership rights and obligations.

Hoa lợi, lợi tức.description: Hoa lợi, lợi tức refers to the produce or income from a property, which is subject to ownership rights.

Vật chính, vật phụ.description: Vật chính, vật phụ refers to the main and secondary assets involved in the merger of properties.

Vật mới.description: Vật mới refers to the new asset created through the merger or mixing of other assets.

Hợp đồng.description: Hợp đồng refers to a contract or agreement between parties, which establishes their obligations and rights. These contracts can cover various types of agreements, such as purchase, gift, exchange, loan, or other ownership transfer agreements that establish ownership rights. Hợp đồng is a legal document that is checked and monitored by the Board of Members. It can also be terminated unilaterally under certain conditions. In a business context, Hợp đồng often refers to contracts or agreements between a company and related parties. Additionally, these contracts may need to be continued and fulfilled even after the termination of a branch.

Thỏa thuận.description: Thỏa thuận refers to agreements between parties regarding the ownership of produce or income from a property.<SEP>Thỏa thuận refers to agreements made between parties regarding ownership and division of property.

Sáp nhập.description: Sáp nhập refers to the process of merging assets, creating new ownership rights and obligations.

Trộn lẫn.description: Trộn lẫn refers to the process of mixing assets, creating new ownership rights and obligations.

Chủ Sở Hữu.description: Chủ Sở Hữu refers to the owner of a property or asset. This individual has the right to use the property according to their will, without causing harm or affecting national, ethnic, public interests, or the legal rights and interests of others. The rights of the Chủ Sở Hữu can be terminated under certain legal conditions. Additionally, the owner can transfer ownership rights to others or retain the rights to the property while granting the right of use to another party. If the property was possessed or used without a legal basis, the Chủ Sở Hữu is entitled to have it returned. In the context of a company, the Chủ Sở Hữu can also authorize a representative.

Nguyên Vật Liệu.description: Nguyên Vật Liệu refers to the raw materials used in the creation of a new object.<SEP>Nguyên Vật Liệu refers to the raw materials used in the processing work.

Người Phát Hiện.description: Người Phát Hiện refers to the person who discovers property or assets.

Công An Cấp Xã.description: Công An Cấp Xã is a local police body responsible for handling discovered property or assets.

Nhà Nước.description: Nhà Nước refers to the state or government.<SEP>Nhà Nước represents the state, which acts as the owner of public property and manages it uniformly.<SEP>Nhà Nước is the governing body that recognizes and protects the existence and development of various types of enterprises, ensuring equality before the law and protecting the legal rights and interests of enterprises and their owners.

Thỏa Thuận.description: Thỏa Thuận refers to various types of agreements between parties in different contexts. It can establish joint ownership, set terms for the guarantee and its execution, and define the conditions for the right to use a property. Thỏa Thuận also encompasses agreements regarding the processing and handling of collateral, the terms and conditions of transactions between buyers and sellers, and the fulfillment of obligations between parties. In lease agreements, Thỏa Thuận outlines the terms and conditions agreed upon between the tenant and the landlord. Additionally, it can refer to agreements concerning the transportation of assets, including the payment terms and conditions involved in such transactions.<SEP>Thỏa Thuận refers to the agreement between the service provider and the service user regarding the terms and conditions of the service.<SEP>Thỏa Thuận refers to agreements or arrangements made between parties in the context of the legal provisions.

Pháp Nhân Bảo Lãnh.description: Pháp Nhân Bảo Lãnh refers to a legal entity that provides a guarantee and is subject to termination upon dissolution.<SEP>Pháp Nhân Bảo Lãnh is a legal entity that provides a guarantee for the obligations of another party.

Bảo Đảm Bằng Tài Sản.description: Bảo Đảm Bằng Tài Sản refers to the use of property as collateral to secure the fulfillment of the guarantee.

Người Thứ Ba.description: Người Thứ Ba is responsible for holding and managing the collateral asset, ensuring its preservation and returning it as required.<SEP>Người Thứ Ba refers to a third party who may benefit from the contract.<SEP>Người Thứ Ba is a third party who may dispute the ownership of the purchased property, leading to potential cancellation of the contract and compensation claims by the buyer.<SEP>Người Thứ Ba refers to a third party who may have rights and obligations in a contract.<SEP>Người Thứ Ba refers to a third party involved in the execution of the authorization contract.<SEP>A third party who receives property from someone who possessed or used it without legal basis and has the obligation to return it.

Bên Nhận Thế Chấp.description: Bên Nhận Thế Chấp is the party that receives the collateral asset from the collateral holder.

Bên Thế Chấp.description: Bên Thế Chấp is the party that provides the collateral asset.

Thế Chấp Quyền Sử Dụng Đất.description: Thế Chấp Quyền Sử Dụng Đất refers to the collateralization of land use rights without collateralizing the assets attached to the land.

Thế Chấp Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất.entity_id: Thế Chấp Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất
Thế Chấp Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất.description: Thế Chấp Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất refers to the collateralization of assets attached to the land without collateralizing the land use rights.

Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản.entity_id: Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản
Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản.description: Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản refers to the termination conditions of collateralization.

Đặt Cọc.description: Đặt Cọc is a form of security where one party (the depositor) provides another party (the recipient) with an asset to ensure the execution of a contract.

Ký Cược.description: Ký Cược is a form of security where the lessee provides the lessor with an asset to ensure the return of the leased asset.

Tài Sản Đặt Cọc.description: Tài Sản Đặt Cọc is the asset provided as security in a placement deposit.

Tài Sản Ký Cược.description: Tài Sản Ký Cược is the asset provided as security in a pledge.<SEP>Tài Sản Ký Cược is the asset that is deposited as collateral and can be claimed by the lessor if the leased asset is not returned.

Nghĩa Vụ.description: Nghĩa Vụ refers to the obligations that are secured by collateral and can lead to the termination of collateralization.<SEP>Nghĩa Vụ is a legal concept that refers to obligations or duties that one party must fulfill for the benefit of another party.<SEP>Nghĩa Vụ refers to obligations or duties that must be fulfilled by one party to another.

Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Khác.description: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Khác refers to alternative security measures that can replace collateralization.

Tài Sản Đã Được Xử Lý.entity_id: Tài Sản Đã Được Xử Lý
Tài Sản Đã Được Xử Lý.description: Tài Sản Đã Được Xử Lý refers to the condition where the collateral asset has been processed, leading to the termination of collateralization.

Thỏa Thuận Của Các Bên.description: Thỏa Thuận Của Các Bên refers to an agreement among the parties that can lead to the termination of collateralization.

Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất.entity_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất
Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất.description: Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất is the owner of the assets attached to the land and may or may not be the user of the land.

Bên Thuê.description: Bên Thuê is the lessee who provides an asset (Tài Sản Ký Cược) to ensure the return of the leased asset.<SEP>Bên Thuê is the party that leases an asset and is responsible for returning it or paying for it if they do not return it.<SEP>Bên Thuê is a party in a lease agreement who has the right to use the leased property and is responsible for paying rent and maintaining the property.<SEP>Bên Thuê is the lessee in a leasing contract.

Bên Cho Thuê.description: Bên Cho Thuê is the lessor who receives the asset (Tài Sản Ký Cược) to ensure the return of the leased asset.<SEP>Bên Cho Thuê is the party that provides the leased asset and has the right to reclaim it if the lease terms are not met.<SEP>Bên Cho Thuê is a party in a lease agreement who provides the leased property and is responsible for delivering the property and maintaining its usability.<SEP>Bên Cho Thuê is the lessor in a leasing contract.

Tài Sản Thế Chấp.description: Người Thứ Ba is responsible for managing and preserving the collateral asset and returning it as required.

Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương L.entity_id: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai
Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương L.description: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai refers to the legal concept of securing future obligations, allowing parties to agree on the scope and duration of the secured obligations.

Tài Sản Bảo Đảm.description: Tài Sản Bảo Đảm refers to the asset used as collateral, which must belong to the guarantor and can be either existing or future assets.<SEP>Tài Sản Bảo Đảm is collateral that is subject to legal provisions for processing and handling.<SEP>Tài Sản Bảo Đảm is collateral that is used to secure the performance of obligations.

Hiệu Lực Đối Kháng Với Người Thứ Ba.entity_id: Hiệu Lực Đối Kháng Với Người Thứ Ba
Hiệu Lực Đối Kháng Với Người Thứ Ba.description: Hiệu Lực Đối Kháng Với Người Thứ Ba refers to the legal effect of collateral measures against third parties, which arises from registration or possession of the collateral asset.

Đăng Ký Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm.entity_id: Đăng Ký Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm
Đăng Ký Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm.description: Đăng Ký Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm refers to the registration of collateral measures, which is a condition for the collateral transaction to be effective.

Các Trường Hợp Xử Lý Tài Sản Bảo Đảm.entity_id: Các Trường Hợp Xử Lý Tài Sản Bảo Đảm
Các Trường Hợp Xử Lý Tài Sản Bảo Đảm.description: Các Trường Hợp Xử Lý Tài Sản Bảo Đảm refers to the circumstances under which collateral assets can be processed, such as when the secured obligation is due and the debtor fails to fulfill it.

Nghĩa Vụ Hiện Tại.description: Nghĩa Vụ Hiện Tại refers to current obligations that can be secured.

Nghĩa Vụ Có Điều Kiện.description: Nghĩa Vụ Có Điều Kiện refers to obligations that are subject to certain conditions.

Pháp Luật.description:
Pháp Luật refers to the legal framework that governs various aspects of legal obligations, agreements, and regulations in Vietnamese society. It encompasses the conditions and agreements related to securing obligations, the fulfillment of obligations, and the procedures and regulations related to collateral and its valuation. Additionally, Pháp Luật governs the terms and conditions of lease agreements and the execution of contracts, including the responsibilities of the parties involved.

Pháp Luật also regulates the rights and obligations of parties involved in the transportation of assets and the operations and decisions of the Hội Đồng Quản Trị (Board of Directors). Furthermore, it governs the rights and obligations of the company owner, including capital contributions, compliance with the company charter, and the separation of personal and company assets. Overall, Pháp Luật provides a comprehensive legal framework that ensures the proper execution and enforcement of various legal and contractual obligations in Vietnamese society.<SEP>Pháp Luật refers to the legal framework that governs the inclusion of compensation and salaries in the company's business expenses.

Nghĩa Vụ Thay Thế Được.description: Nghĩa Vụ Thay Thế Được refers to an obligation that can be replaced by another obligation if the original obligation cannot be fulfilled, provided it is accepted by the party with the right.

Nghĩa Vụ Riêng Rẽ.description: Nghĩa Vụ Riêng Rẽ is an obligation where multiple people are responsible for a specific part of the obligation, and each person is only required to fulfill their own part.

Nghĩa Vụ Liên Đới.description: Nghĩa Vụ Liên Đới is an obligation where multiple people are jointly responsible for fulfilling the obligation, and the party with the right can demand any one of them to fulfill the entire obligation.

Nghĩa Vụ Đối Với Nhiều Người Có Quyền Li.entity_id: Nghĩa Vụ Đối Với Nhiều Người Có Quyền Liên Đới
Nghĩa Vụ Đối Với Nhiều Người Có Quyền Li.description: Nghĩa Vụ Đối Với Nhiều Người Có Quyền Liên Đới is an obligation where each of the multiple parties with the right can demand the fulfillment of the entire obligation from the party with the obligation.

Nghĩa Vụ Phân Chia Được Theo Phần.entity_id: Nghĩa Vụ Phân Chia Được Theo Phần
Nghĩa Vụ Phân Chia Được Theo Phần.description: Nghĩa Vụ Phân Chia Được Theo Phần is an obligation where the object of the obligation can be divided into parts for fulfillment.

Nghĩa Vụ Không Phân Chia Được Theo Phần.entity_id: Nghĩa Vụ Không Phân Chia Được Theo Phần
Nghĩa Vụ Không Phân Chia Được Theo Phần.description: Nghĩa Vụ Không Phân Chia Được Theo Phần is an obligation where the object of the obligation must be fulfilled all at once.

Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.entity_id: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.description: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ includes various measures to ensure the fulfillment of obligations, such as collateral, mortgage, deposit, and guarantee.<SEP>Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ refers to the measures that ensure the fulfillment of obligations in a contract, which are not affected by the invalidity of the main contract.

Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm.entity_id: Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm
Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm.description: Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm refers to the scope of an obligation that can be secured, which can be partial or full, and can include current, future, or conditional obligations.

Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ refers to the party that is responsible for fulfilling an obligation.<SEP>Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ refers to the party that is responsible for fulfilling an obligation.<SEP>Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is the party responsible for fulfilling certain obligations, such as making payments or performing specific actions.<SEP>The party with the obligation is responsible for performing the task and compensating for damages.<SEP>Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ refers to the party that is obligated to fulfill a duty or obligation.

Bên Có Quyền.description: Bên Có Quyền refers to the party that has the right to demand the fulfillment of an obligation.<SEP>Bên Có Quyền refers to the party that has the right to demand the fulfillment of an obligation.<SEP>Bên Có Quyền is the party that has the right to enforce the obligations of the other party, such as receiving payment or compensation.<SEP>The party with the right has the ability to demand performance of obligations and can transfer the right to demand to a substitute party.<SEP>Bên Có Quyền refers to the party that has the right to demand the fulfillment of an obligation.

Nghĩa Vụ Ban Đầu.description: Nghĩa Vụ Thay Thế Được can replace the original obligation if it cannot be fulfilled, provided it is accepted by the party with the right.

Nhiều Người.description: Nhiều Người are responsible for their specific parts of the obligation, and each person is only required to fulfill their own part.

Nhiều Người Có Quyền.description: Nhiều Người Có Quyền can each demand the fulfillment of the entire obligation from the party with the obligation.

Đối Tượng Nghĩa Vụ.description: Đối Tượng Nghĩa Vụ can be divided into parts for fulfillment.

Quyền Hưởng Dụng.description: Quyền Hưởng Dụng is a legal right that allows an individual or entity to exploit and benefit from the utility and income of another's property for a specified period.<SEP>Quyền Hưởng Dụng is the right to use a property and enjoy its benefits.

Người Hưởng Dụng.description: Người Hưởng Dụng is the individual or entity that has the right to exploit and benefit from the utility and income of another's property for a specified period.<SEP>Người Hưởng Dụng is an individual who has the right to use a property and is entitled to the benefits derived from it.

Bất Động Sản.description: Bất Động Sản refers to real estate property that can be subject to rights of use and ownership.<SEP>Bất Động Sản refers to real estate or immovable property.<SEP>Bất động sản refers to real estate assets, and the applicable law for inheritance and contracts involving real estate is determined by the law of the country where the real estate is located.

Điều 255.description: Điều 255 is a legal provision that allows the owner of real estate to install power lines and communication lines through other properties reasonably, ensuring safety and convenience.

Điều 256.description: Điều 256 is a legal provision that outlines the conditions under which rights to adjacent real estate are terminated.

Điều 257.description: Điều 257 is a legal provision that defines the right of use.

Điều 258.description: Điều 258 is a legal provision that establishes the basis for the right of use.

Điều 262.description: Điều 262 is a legal provision that outlines the obligations of the user.

Đиều 261.description: Đиều 261 outlines the rights of the user.

Đиều 263.description: Đиều 263 outlines the rights and obligations of the property owner.

Thỏa Thuận Khác.description: Thỏa Thuận Khác refers to an agreement that differs from the standard legal provisions.<SEP>Thỏa Thuận Khác refers to an alternative agreement that may override the invalid terms in a contract.

Trách Nhiệm Tiếp Tục Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.entity_id: Trách Nhiệm Tiếp Tục Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
Trách Nhiệm Tiếp Tục Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.description: Trách Nhiệm Tiếp Tục Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ refers to the responsibility to continue fulfilling an obligation when it has not been fulfilled correctly.

Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.description: Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ refers to the delay in fulfilling an obligation.

Hoãn Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.description: Hoãn Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ refers to the postponement of fulfilling an obligation.

Chậm Tiếp Nhận Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.description: Chậm Tiếp Nhận Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ refers to the delay in accepting the fulfillment of an obligation.

Trách Nhiệm Do Không Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ.description: Trách Nhiệm Do Không Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Giao Vật refers to the responsibility for not fulfilling an obligation to deliver a specific item.

Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ T.entity_id: Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trả Tiền
Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ T.description: Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trả Tiền refers to the responsibility for delaying the payment of money.

Lãi Suất.description: Lãi Suất refers to the interest rate applied for delayed payments.<SEP>Lãi Suất refers to the interest rate agreed upon between the buyer and seller, which is used to calculate the interest on late payments.<SEP>Lãi Suất refers to the interest rate agreed upon in a loan agreement, with a maximum limit of 20% per year unless otherwise specified by law.

Quyền Bề Mặt.description: Quyền Bề Mặt is the right of an entity to use the surface of the land, water, and airspace above the land and water that belongs to another entity.<SEP>Quyền Bề Mặt is a legal concept that refers to the rights associated with the surface of land, water, and airspace.

Chủ Thể Quyền Bề Mặt.description: Chủ Thể Quyền Bề Mặt is an individual or entity that has the right to use the surface of the land, water, and airspace above the land and water that belongs to another entity.<SEP>Chủ Thể Quyền Bề Mặt refers to the individual or entity that holds the rights associated with the surface of land, water, and airspace.

Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản.description: Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản is the owner of the property.

Hoa Lợi, Lợi Tức.description: Hoa Lợi, Lợi Tức refers to the benefits and profits derived from the property.<SEP>Income or profits derived from the possession or use of another's property without legal basis and must be returned.

Quyền Sử Dụng Đất.description: Quyền Sử Dụng Đất is the right to use land.<SEP>Quyền sử dụng đất refers to the rights to use land, which can be transferred, leased, subleased, gifted, mortgaged, or used as capital contribution under a Hợp đồng về quyền sử dụng đất.

Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất.entity_id: Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất.description: Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất is an individual or entity that has the right to use land.

Di Chúc.description: Di Chúc is a legal document that specifies the distribution of assets after the death of an individual.<SEP>Di Chúc is a legal document that expresses the testator's wishes regarding the distribution of their estate after death.<SEP>Di Chúc is the will that determines the distribution of property.<SEP>Di Chúc is the document that specifies the allocation of an estate and the conditions under which it is distributed.<SEP>Di Chúc is a legal document that specifies the distribution of a person's assets after their death.<SEP>A will that specifies the division of the estate and may include provisions for the executor and heirs.<SEP>Di chúc is a legal document that specifies the distribution of assets after death. The capacity to create, modify, or revoke a di chúc is determined by the law of the country where the testator had citizenship at the time of the action.

Tài sản thế chấp.description: Tài sản thế chấp refers to the collateral asset used to secure a debt or obligation.<SEP>Tài sản thế chấp refers to the property used as collateral in a pledge agreement.

Bên thế chấp.description: Bên thế chấp is the party that provides the collateral asset to secure a debt or obligation.<SEP>Bên thế chấp is the party that uses their own property to secure an obligation and does not transfer the property to the other party.

Bên nhận thế chấp.description: Bên nhận thế chấp is the party that receives the collateral asset to secure a debt or obligation.<SEP>Bên nhận thế chấp is the party that receives the property as collateral for an obligation.

Người thứ ba giữ tài sản thế chấp.entity_id: Người thứ ba giữ tài sản thế chấp
Người thứ ba giữ tài sản thế chấp.description: Người thứ ba giữ tài sản thế chấp is a third party who holds the collateral asset on behalf of the parties involved.

Hàng hóa luân chuyển.description: Hàng hóa luân chuyển refers to goods that are in circulation during the production and business processes.

Kho hàng.description: Kho hàng refers to a warehouse or storage facility that holds goods as collateral.

Giấy tờ liên quan đến tài sản thế chấp.entity_id: Giấy tờ liên quan đến tài sản thế chấp
Giấy tờ liên quan đến tài sản thế chấp.description: Giấy tờ liên quan đến tài sản thế chấp refers to documents related to the collateral asset.

Điều 321.description: Điều 321 is a legal provision that outlines the rights of the party providing the collateral.

Điều 322.description: Điều 322 is a legal provision that outlines the obligations of the party receiving the collateral.

Điều 323.description: Điều 323 is a legal provision that outlines the rights of the party receiving the collateral.

Điều 324.description: Điều 324 is a legal provision that outlines the rights and obligations of the third party holding the collateral.

Điều 299.description: Điều 299 is a legal provision that outlines the conditions under which the collateral can be processed.

91/2015/qh13.description: 91/2015/qh13 is the source reference for the legal provisions mentioned in the text.<SEP>91/2015/qh13 is the source document or legal reference for the provisions mentioned.

Tổ chức bảo hiểm.description: Tổ chức bảo hiểm is the insurance organization that provides insurance for the collateral property.

Điều 317.description: Điều 317 defines the concept of pledging property as a means of securing an obligation.

Điều 318.description: Điều 318 outlines the specifics of what constitutes collateral property.

Hoa lợi.description: Hoa lợi refers to the income or benefits derived from the collateral property, which is returned to the pledging party unless there is a different agreement.<SEP>Hoa lợi refers to the benefits or profits derived from the use of an item during the trial period.

Lợi tức.description: Lợi tức refers to the profit or income derived from the collateral property, which is returned to the pledging party unless there is a different agreement.

Điều 318.description: Điều 318 specifies the details of what constitutes collateral property.

Bảo lãnh.description: Bảo lãnh is a form of guarantee that ends under certain conditions such as the fulfillment of obligations or replacement by another form of security.

Tín chấp.description: Tín chấp is a form of guarantee provided by political-social organizations for individuals or poor households to borrow money from financial institutions for production, business, or consumption.

Tổ chức chính trị - xã hội.description: Tổ chức chính trị - xã hội are political-social organizations that can provide guarantees for individuals or poor households to borrow money from financial institutions.

Cầm giữ tài sản.description: Cầm giữ tài sản is the act of holding assets legally when the debtor fails to fulfill their obligations.

Bên cầm giữ.description: Bên cầm giữ is the party that legally holds the assets when the debtor fails to fulfill their obligations.

Tổ chức tín dụng.description: Tổ chức tín dụng are financial institutions that provide loans to individuals or households.

Vi phạm nghĩa vụ.description: Vi phạm nghĩa vụ refers to the failure to fulfill obligations as agreed upon in a contract.

Điều 343.description: Điều 343 outlines the conditions under which a guarantee (bảo lãnh) is terminated.

Điều 345.description: Điều 345 specifies the forms and contents of credit guarantees (tín chấp).

Ký Quỹ.description: Ký quỹ is the act of depositing a sum of money, precious metals, precious stones, or valuable documents into a blocked account at a financial institution to ensure the fulfillment of obligations.

Bảo Lưu Quyền Sở Hữu.description: Bảo lưu quyền sở hữu is the retention of ownership rights by the seller until the buyer has fully fulfilled their payment obligations.

Bảo Lãnh.description: Bảo lãnh is a third party's commitment to fulfill the obligations of the party being guaranteed if they fail to do so.

Bên Bán.description: Bên Bán is the party that sells an asset and retains ownership until the buyer has fully paid for it.<SEP>Bên Bán refers to the seller in a transaction, who has various responsibilities such as delivering goods, providing information, and compensating for damages.<SEP>Bên Bán is responsible for providing information and guidance on the use of the purchased property, ensuring the ownership rights of the purchased property, and guaranteeing the quality of the purchased item.

Bên Mua.description: Bên Mua is the party that purchases an asset and has the right to use it during the period of retained ownership.<SEP>Bên Mua refers to the buyer in a transaction, who has various rights and obligations such as receiving goods, paying for them, and seeking compensation for damages.<SEP>Bên Mua is the buyer who has the right to request information and guidance on the purchased property, to cancel the contract if ownership rights are disputed, and to request repairs, replacements, or refunds for defective items within the warranty period.

Tài Sản Thuê.description: Tài Sản Thuê is the asset that is leased and must be returned or paid for by the lessee.<SEP>Tài Sản Thuê refers to the leased property that is the subject of the lease agreement, which must be delivered in the agreed-upon condition and used for the agreed-upon purpose.

Tài Khoản Phong Tỏa.description: Tài Khoản Phong Tỏa is a blocked account at a financial institution where the collateral is deposited.

Tổ Chức Tín Dụng.description: Tổ Chức Tín Dụng is a financial institution that manages the blocked account where the collateral is deposited.

Điều 367.description: Article 367 states that the person transferring the right to claim is not responsible for the obligor's ability to fulfill the obligation after the transfer, except in cases of different agreements.

Điều 369.description: Article 369 describes the right of the obligor to refuse to fulfill the obligation if they were not notified about the transfer of the right to claim.

Điều 373.description: Article 373 defines the completion of an obligation.

Điều 422.description: Điều 422 is a legal provision that specifies the circumstances under which a contract can be terminated.

Điều 425.description: Điều 425 is a legal provision that outlines the conditions under which a contract can be canceled due to a party's inability to perform its obligations.

Điều 427.description: Điều 427 is a legal provision that describes the consequences of canceling a contract, including the obligations of the parties and the resolution of disputes.

Bộ luật.description: Bộ luật refers to a legal code or set of laws that governs the procedures and conditions for modifying, terminating, and canceling contracts.<SEP>Bộ luật is a legal document that contains regulations and rules for various aspects of transportation and contractual obligations.

Người có nghĩa vụ.description: Người có nghĩa vụ refers to the party in a contract who is responsible for performing certain obligations.<SEP>Người có nghĩa vụ refers to the party that is responsible for fulfilling the terms of the contract and is subject to penalties or compensation if they violate the contract.

Người có quyền.description: Người có quyền refers to the party in a contract who has the right to demand the performance of certain obligations from the other party.<SEP>Người có quyền refers to the party that has the right to claim compensation for damages resulting from a breach of contract.

Bên kia.description: Bên kia refers to the other party in a contract, typically in the context of one party's obligations or rights.

Bên vi phạm.description: Bên vi phạm refers to the party in a contract who has breached the terms of the agreement.

Bên hủy bỏ hợp đồng.description: Bên hủy bỏ hợp đồng refers to the party in a contract who has the right to cancel the contract under certain conditions.

Bên bị thiệt hại.description: Bên bị thiệt hại refers to the party in a contract who suffers a loss or damage due to the other party's breach of the agreement.

Phạt vi phạm.description: Phạt vi phạm refers to the penalty agreed upon in a contract for the party that violates the terms of the contract.

Thiệt hại được bồi thường.description: Thiệt hại được bồi thường refers to the compensation for damages resulting from a breach of contract.

Hoàn cảnh thay đổi cơ bản.description: Hoàn cảnh thay đổi cơ bản refers to a fundamental change in circumstances that affects the execution of a contract.

Bên giao kết hợp đồng.description: Bên giao kết hợp đồng refers to the parties involved in the contract who are responsible for its execution and fulfillment.

Bên vi phạm nghĩa vụ.description: Bên vi phạm nghĩa vụ refers to the party that violates the terms of the contract and is subject to penalties or compensation.

Bên thụ hưởng.description: Bên thụ hưởng refers to the party that is entitled to receive the benefits from the contract.

Đиều 420.description: Đиều 420 addresses the execution of a contract when there is a fundamental change in circumstances, including the conditions for such a change and the rights of the affected party to renegotiate or terminate the contract, affecting the parties involved in the contract.

Địa Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng.entity_id: Địa Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng
Địa Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng.description: The location where a contract is concluded is agreed upon by the parties; if there is no agreement, it is the residence of an individual or the headquarters of a legal entity that proposed the contract.

Thời Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng.entity_id: Thời Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng
Thời Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng.description: The time when a contract is concluded is when the proposing party receives acceptance. If there is an agreement that silence is acceptance, the time is the end of the agreed period. For oral contracts, it is when the parties agree on the content. For written contracts, it is when the last party signs or accepts in another form.<SEP>Thời Điểm Giao Kết Hợp Đồng refers to the time and place where the contract is agreed upon, which is used to determine the payment method based on local customs.

Hiệu Lực Của Hợp Đồng.description: A legally concluded contract becomes effective from the time of conclusion, unless otherwise agreed or provided by law. Once effective, the parties must perform their rights and obligations as committed.

Các Loại Hợp Đồng Chủ Yếu.entity_id: Các Loại Hợp Đồng Chủ Yếu
Các Loại Hợp Đồng Chủ Yếu.description: Contracts can be categorized into bilateral, unilateral, main, subsidiary, for the benefit of a third party, and conditional contracts.

Phụ Lục Hợp Đồng.description: An annex to a contract can provide detailed terms and has the same effect as the contract itself. If the annex contradicts the contract, the conflicting clause is invalid unless agreed otherwise.

Giải Thích Hợp Đồng.description: Interpretation of a contract involves understanding unclear terms based on the parties' intentions, the purpose of the contract, and local customs. Contradictions between the parties' common will and the contract language are resolved in favor of the common will.

Bên Đề Nghị.description: Bên Đề Nghị refers to the party that proposes the contract.<SEP>Bên Đề Nghị is the party proposing to enter into a contract.

Bên Ký Hợp Đồng.description: Bên Ký Hợp Đồng refers to the parties that sign the contract.

Lãi Suất Phát Sinh Do Chậm Trả Tiền.entity_id: Lãi Suất Phát Sinh Do Chậm Trả Tiền
Lãi Suất Phát Sinh Do Chậm Trả Tiền.description: Lãi suất phát sinh do chậm trả tiền is determined by the agreement of the parties but cannot exceed the interest rate specified in Article 468 of this Civil Code; if there is no agreement, it is executed according to the provisions of Article 468.

Trách Nhiệm Do Không Thực Hiện Hoặc Khôn.entity_id: Trách Nhiệm Do Không Thực Hiện Hoặc Không Được Thực Hiện Một Công Việc
Trách Nhiệm Do Không Thực Hiện Hoặc Khôn.description: Responsibility for not performing or not being allowed to perform a task includes the right to demand the other party to continue performing the task, perform it themselves, or have someone else perform it and demand reasonable costs and compensation for damages.

Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Tiếp Nhận Việc Thực.entity_id: Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Tiếp Nhận Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Tiếp Nhận Việc Thực.description: Responsibility for delayed acceptance of the performance of obligations includes compensation for damages and bearing all risks and costs incurred from the time of delayed acceptance.

Trách Nhiệm Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Do Vi P.entity_id: Trách Nhiệm Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Do Vi Phạm Nghĩa Vụ
Trách Nhiệm Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Do Vi P.description: Responsibility for compensating damages caused by the violation of obligations includes full compensation for damages, except for agreements or legal provisions to the contrary.

Thiệt Hại Do Vi Phạm Nghĩa Vụ.entity_id: Thiệt Hại Do Vi Phạm Nghĩa Vụ
Thiệt Hại Do Vi Phạm Nghĩa Vụ.description: Damages caused by the violation of obligations include material and non-material damages.

Nghĩa Vụ Ngăn Chặn, Hạn Chế Thiệt Hại.entity_id: Nghĩa Vụ Ngăn Chặn, Hạn Chế Thiệt Hại
Nghĩa Vụ Ngăn Chặn, Hạn Chế Thiệt Hại.description: The obligation to prevent and limit damages includes taking necessary and reasonable measures to prevent or limit damages.

Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Trong Trường Hợp Bê.entity_id: Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Trong Trường Hợp Bên Bị Vi Phạm Có Lỗi
Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Trong Trường Hợp Bê.description: Compensation for damages when the party being violated is at fault includes compensation proportional to the degree of fault.

Lỗi Trong Trách Nhiệm Dân Sự.entity_id: Lỗi Trong Trách Nhiệm Dân Sự
Lỗi Trong Trách Nhiệm Dân Sự.description: Fault in civil liability includes intentional fault and unintentional fault.

Chuyển Giao Quyền Yêu Cầu.description: Transfer of the right to demand includes transferring the right to demand to a substitute party according to an agreement, except for certain cases.

Người Thế Quyền.description: The substitute party becomes the party with the right to demand after the transfer of the right to demand.

Thiệt Hại Do Tài Sản Bị Xâm Phạm.description: Thiệt hại do tài sản bị xâm phạm includes loss, destruction, or damage to property, loss of benefits associated with the use of the property, reasonable costs to prevent, limit, and mitigate damage, and other damages as prescribed by law.

Thiệt Hại Do Sức Khỏe Bị Xâm Phạm.entity_id: Thiệt Hại Do Sức Khỏe Bị Xâm Phạm
Thiệt Hại Do Sức Khỏe Bị Xâm Phạm.description: Thiệt hại do sức khỏe bị xâm phạm includes reasonable costs for medical treatment, recovery, and restoration of lost or reduced functions, actual income loss or reduction, reasonable costs and actual income loss of caregivers, and other damages as prescribed by law. The responsible party must compensate for these damages and a separate amount for mental distress.

Thiệt Hại Do Tính Mạng Bị Xâm Phạm.entity_id: Thiệt Hại Do Tính Mạng Bị Xâm Phạm
Thiệt Hại Do Tính Mạng Bị Xâm Phạm.description: Thiệt hại do tính mạng bị xâm phạm includes damages as prescribed in Article 590, reasonable costs for burial, maintenance payments for dependents, and other damages as prescribed by law. The responsible party must compensate for these damages and a separate amount for mental distress for close relatives.

Thiệt Hại Do Danh Dự, Nhân Phẩm, Uy Tín.entity_id: Thiệt Hại Do Danh Dự, Nhân Phẩm, Uy Tín Bị Xâm Phạm
Thiệt Hại Do Danh Dự, Nhân Phẩm, Uy Tín.description: Thiệt hại do danh dự, nhân phẩm, uy tín bị xâm phạm includes reasonable costs to limit and mitigate damage, actual income loss or reduction, and other damages as prescribed by law. The responsible party must compensate for these damages and a separate amount for mental distress.

Người Chịu Trách Nhiệm Bồi Thường.description: Người chịu trách nhiệm bồi thường is the party responsible for compensating for damages in cases of health, life, and reputation being violated.

Người chết.description: Người chết refers to the deceased individual whose estate is being managed.

Người quản lý di sản.description: Người quản lý di sản is an individual appointed in the will or by the heirs to manage the estate.<SEP>The person managing the estate has specific duties and rights as outlined in the law.

Thời điểm mở thừa kế.description: Thời điểm mở thừa kế is the date determined by the court for the opening of the estate, as specified in Article 71 of the law.

Nghĩa vụ tài sản.description: Nghĩa vụ tài sản are the financial obligations left by the deceased that must be fulfilled by the heirs.

Địa điểm mở thừa kế.description: Địa điểm mở thừa kế is the last place of residence of the deceased; if not determinable, it is the location of the entire estate or the majority of the estate.

Di Tặng.description: Di Tặng is the concept of a deceased person allocating a portion of their estate to another individual as specified in their will.

Người Được Di Tặng.description: Người Được Di Tặng is the individual who receives a portion of the estate as specified in the will.

Thừa Kế Theo Pháp Luật.description: Thừa Kế Theo Pháp Luật is the concept of inheritance according to the legal order and conditions specified by law.

Nghĩa Vụ Tài Sản.description: Nghĩa Vụ Tài Sản is the financial obligation of the deceased that must be settled from the estate.

Phần Di Sản.description: Phần Di Sản refers to a portion of the estate that is allocated or distributed according to the will or by law.

Tẩy Xóa, Sửa Chữa.description: Tẩy Xóa, Sửa Chữa refers to the alterations made to a will, which require the signature of the person creating the will or a witness.

Người Chiếm Hữu.description: A person who possesses or uses another's property without legal basis and must return it to the rightful owner.

Người Sử Dụng Tài Sản.description: A person who uses another's property without legal basis and must return it to the rightful owner.

Người Bị Thiệt Hại.description: A person who suffers a loss due to another's benefit from their property without legal basis and is entitled to have the benefit returned.

Người Chiếm hữu.description: If a third party receives property from someone who possessed it without legal basis, the third party must return it.

Law on Enterprises.description: The Law on Enterprises regulates the establishment, management, reorganization, dissolution, and related activities of enterprises, including limited liability companies, joint-stock companies, partnership companies, and private enterprises.

Joint-Stock Companies.description: Joint-Stock Companies are a type of enterprise regulated by the Law on Enterprises.

Partnership Companies.description: Partnership Companies are a type of enterprise regulated by the Law on Enterprises.

Private Enterprises.description: Private Enterprises are a type of enterprise regulated by the Law on Enterprises.

Management.description: Management refers to the organizational activities of running an enterprise.

Reorganization.description: Reorganization refers to the restructuring of an enterprise.

Dissolution.description: Dissolution refers to the process of ending an enterprise.

Related Activities.description: Related Activities refer to other activities associated with the operation of an enterprise.

Other Laws.description: Other Laws are legal documents that may have specific regulations regarding the establishment, management, reorganization, dissolution, and related activities of enterprises.

Organizations and Individuals.description: Organizations and Individuals are entities that are related to the establishment, management, reorganization, dissolution, and related activities of enterprises.

Doanh nghiệp Cung Ứng Sản Phẩm, Dịch Vụ.description: Doanh nghiệp cung ứng sản phẩm, dịch vụ công ích có quyền và nghĩa vụ được quy định tại Điều 9 của Luật này.

Doanh nghiệp Xã Hội.description: Doanh nghiệp xã hội phải đáp ứng các tiêu chí và có quyền và nghĩa vụ được quy định tại Điều 10 của Luật này.

Quyền và Nghĩa Vụ.description: Quyền và nghĩa vụ của doanh nghiệp cung ứng sản phẩm, dịch vụ công ích và doanh nghiệp xã hội được quy định trong Luật này.

Tiêu Chí.description: Tiêu chí mà doanh nghiệp xã hội phải đáp ứng được quy định tại Điều 10 của Luật này.

Chế Độ Lưu Giữ Tài Liệu.description: Chế độ lưu giữ tài liệu của doanh nghiệp được quy định tại Điều 11 của Luật này.

Điều 9.description: Điều 9 quy định về quyền và nghĩa vụ của doanh nghiệp cung ứng sản phẩm, dịch vụ công ích.

Điều 10.description: Điều 10 quy định về tiêu chí, quyền và nghĩa vụ của doanh nghiệp xã hội.

Điều 11.description: Điều 11 quy định về chế độ lưu giữ tài liệu của doanh nghiệp.

Nghĩa Vụ Khác.description: Nghĩa vụ khác theo quy định của pháp luật.

Luật này.description:
Luật này is a specific legal document in Vietnam that governs various aspects of company operations, management, and corporate governance. This law outlines the responsibilities and conditions for individuals acting as representatives for shareholders, members, or owners of a company. It includes detailed provisions such as Điều 51, Điều 52, and Điều 53, which establish the legal framework for the operations and management of companies. The law specifies the responsibilities and rights of the board of members and the supervisory board, ensuring that these bodies operate within the legal parameters set forth.

Luật này also governs the management structure and operations of state-owned enterprises, providing a comprehensive legal framework for the roles and responsibilities of key positions such as the Chairman, Board of Members, Director, and General Director. It is a critical document for business registration procedures and the overall regulation of corporate activities in Vietnam. The law covers the responsibilities of the Board of Members and the procedures for initiating lawsuits. It also governs the rights and obligations of shareholders and the management of the company, including the procedures and decisions of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông. Additionally, it outlines the rights and responsibilities of the Ban kiểm soát and its members, ensuring that all aspects of corporate governance are covered under the legal framework.

Furthermore, Luật này refers to the legal framework governing arbitration and dispute resolution in Vietnam, including the establishment and operation of arbitration centers such as the Trung tâm trọng tài. This law came into effect on January 1, 2021, and is a key regulation for the activities of arbitration centers and the resolution of disputes within the corporate sector.<SEP>Luật này refers to the legal document or law that governs the procedures for resolving disputes and the authority of the arbitration council.<SEP>Luật này refers to the specific law or regulation being discussed, which includes provisions related to arbitration proceedings.<SEP>Luật này refers to the law governing the operation of foreign arbitration organizations in Vietnam.<SEP>Luật này refers to the legal framework that governs the procedures for selecting and designating a replacement Arbitrator.

Hội đồng thành viên.description: Hội đồng thành viên, also known as the Board of Members, is a governing body within a company, typically found in limited liability companies and partnerships. It acts on behalf of the shareholders, members, or owners and is responsible for making decisions regarding the company's operations and governance. The board can appoint a new legal representative and decide on the acceptance of new members. It consists of 3 to 7 members appointed by the company owner, with a term not exceeding 5 years. Hội đồng thành viên convenes for meetings to make decisions and manage the company, representing it and performing its rights and obligations. The board is responsible for appointing the General Director or CEO and making decisions regarding the company's capital and profit distribution. It meets to discuss and decide on issues within its authority and responsibilities, ensuring the company operates effectively and in the best interest of its members.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên is an organizational body that conducts meetings and makes decisions regarding the company's operations and financial information.<SEP>The Board of Members is responsible for appointing the Director or General Director of the company.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên is the board of members responsible for making decisions and overseeing the company's operations.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên is the body that makes decisions regarding the company's members, including the potential exclusion of members who fail to meet their capital contribution obligations.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên is the governing body of the company that approves the acceptance of new members and makes decisions regarding the company's operations.

Đại hội đồng cổ đông.description: Đại hội đồng cổ đông, also known as the General Shareholders' Meeting, is a significant event where shareholders gather to make important decisions regarding the company's operations, governance, and capital. This meeting is the highest decision-making body of a company and is crucial for making decisions on various matters, including the nomination of individuals to the Board of Directors and Supervisory Board, the purchase and conversion of preferred shares into common shares, and the sale of shares to raise capital. At this meeting, shareholders can attend, speak, and exercise their voting rights directly or through proxies. The meeting is an organization that makes decisions through resolutions, where shareholders discuss and vote on important matters related to the company's direction and policies. The representative at the meeting acts on behalf of the shareholders, members, or owners, ensuring that their interests are represented and their voices heard in the decision-making process. Typically, this meeting is held annually, providing a platform for shareholders to influence the company's direction and policies.<SEP>The General Shareholders' Meeting has the authority to approve certain transactions and decisions made by the Board of Directors.<SEP>Đại hội đồng cổ đông is a meeting of shareholders of a company to discuss and vote on important matters related to the company.<SEP>Đại hội đồng cổ đông is a meeting of shareholders to discuss and vote on important matters related to the company.<SEP>Đại hội đồng cổ đông is a general meeting of shareholders to discuss and vote on important matters related to the company.

Thành viên.description: Thành viên refers to a member of a company who appoints a representative to act on their behalf.<SEP>Thành viên refers to the members of the company who have rights and obligations as defined by the company's charter and the law.<SEP>Thành viên refers to the members of the company's governing body who can request meetings and participate in decision-making.<SEP>Thành viên refers to members of the company who can contribute capital and receive profits.<SEP>Thành viên refers to the members of the Board of Members.<SEP>Thành viên refers to members of the company.

Cổ đông.description: Cổ đông refers to the shareholders of a company who have purchased shares and have their information recorded in the shareholder register. These shareholders can be either organizations or individuals and have the right to freely transfer their shares. Cổ đông have rights and responsibilities regarding the company's shares, including the right to appoint a representative to act on their behalf. They are required to pay for the shares they have registered to purchase within a specified period. Additionally, Cổ đông have the right to request the Tòa án or Trọng tài to invalidate a resolution if necessary. They also receive the Biên bản kiểm phiếu and Nghị quyết and have the right to attend and vote at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông, where they can participate in the General Shareholders' Meeting and vote on matters discussed. Overall, Cổ đông are integral to the governance and financial structure of a company, holding certain rights and obligations associated with their shareholding.<SEP>Cổ đông refers to shareholders of a company who have the right to receive dividends and participate in the decision-making process of the company.<SEP>Cổ đông is a shareholder of the company who has the right to examine certain reports under specific conditions.<SEP>Cổ đông is a person who owns shares in a company and has certain rights and responsibilities as a shareholder.<SEP>A shareholder who can transfer their shares to another shareholder or a non-shareholder entity.

Bên thứ ba.description: Bên thứ ba refers to a third party who is not directly involved in the appointment of a representative but may be affected by the actions of the representative.

Người quản lý công ty.description: Người quản lý công ty refers to the manager of a company who is responsible for the day-to-day operations and management of the company.<SEP>Người quản lý công ty is a person in a leadership position within the company who can be requested to provide information by the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>Người quản lý công ty is the manager of the company, responsible for overseeing the company's operations and management.<SEP>Người quản lý công ty refers to the company's management responsible for providing information from the Sổ đăng ký cổ đông to shareholders.<SEP>Company managers are responsible for the dissolution process and its compliance with regulations.

Người có thẩm quyền bổ nhiệm người quản.entity_id: Người có thẩm quyền bổ nhiệm người quản lý công ty
Người có thẩm quyền bổ nhiệm người quản.description: Người có thẩm quyền bổ nhiệm người quản lý công ty refers to the person with the authority to appoint the manager of a company.

Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.entity_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.description: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp is a registration certificate for a business entity in Vietnam. It is the official document issued to a company upon its establishment and registration. The certificate is granted when certain conditions are met, such as the submission of valid registration documents and the payment of registration fees. This certificate is essential as it grants legal entity status to a corporation, allowing it to operate legally within the country. It is issued by the Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh, the business registration agency, to confirm the registration of a business. The certificate is also reissued after a company conversion, ensuring that the legal status of the company is updated accordingly.<SEP>Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp is a business registration certificate that can be revoked by the government.<SEP>Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp is a certificate issued to businesses upon successful registration.<SEP>The business registration certificate is a document that can be revoked, leading to the dissolution of a business.<SEP>Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp is a registration certificate for a business entity.

Hồ sơ đăng ký doanh nghiệp.entity_id: Hồ sơ đăng ký doanh nghiệp
Hồ sơ đăng ký doanh nghiệp.description: Hồ sơ đăng ký doanh nghiệp is the registration file for a business entity.<SEP>The Business Registration Application is a document submitted to the Business Registration Authority for registering a business.<SEP>The registration documents for a business entity must be valid and complete.

Hồ sơ đăng ký thay đổi nội dung đăng ký.entity_id: Hồ sơ đăng ký thay đổi nội dung đăng ký doanh nghiệp
Hồ sơ đăng ký thay đổi nội dung đăng ký.description: Hồ sơ đăng ký thay đổi nội dung đăng ký doanh nghiệp is the registration file for changes to the registration of a business entity.

Vốn điều lệ.description: Vốn điều lệ refers to the registered capital of a company.<SEP>The registered capital of a company is included in the Certificate of Business Registration.<SEP>The registered capital of the company, which is the total value of assets committed by the owner.<SEP>Vốn điều lệ refers to the registered capital of a company, which can be increased or decreased under certain conditions.<SEP>Vốn điều lệ refers to the registered capital of the company, which can be adjusted based on the payment status of shares.<SEP>Vốn điều lệ is the registered capital of a corporation, which is the total face value of shares sold.

Ngành, nghề chưa được tiếp cận thị trườn.description: Ngành, nghề chưa được tiếp cận thị trường đối với nhà đầu tư nước ngoài refers to industries and professions that have not yet been opened to foreign investors.

Ngành, nghề đầu tư kinh doanh có điều ki.description: Ngành, nghề đầu tư kinh doanh có điều kiện refers to industries and professions that require certain conditions to be met before investment and business activities can be conducted.

Tài trợ khủng bố.description: Tài trợ khủng bố refers to financing terrorism.

Hành Vi Pháp Lý Đơn Phương.description: Hành Vi Pháp Lý Đơn Phương refers to unilateral legal acts, which are governed by the law of the country where the individual establishing the act resides or where the legal entity is established.

Nghĩa Vụ Hoàn Trả.description: Nghĩa Vụ Hoàn Trả is the obligation to return assets or benefits obtained without legal basis, determined by the law of the country where the assets were held or where the benefits were derived.

Thực Hiện Công Việc Không Có Ủy Quyền.description: Thực Hiện Công Việc Không Có Ủy Quyền refers to performing tasks without authorization, where the applicable law is chosen by agreement or is the law of the country where the task is performed.

Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Ngoài Hợp Đồng.description: Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Ngoài Hợp Đồng is the compensation for damages outside of a contract, where the applicable law is chosen by agreement or is the law of the country where the damage occurred.

Người Có Quan Hệ Gia Đình.description: People with family relationships include spouses, parents, children, siblings, and in-laws.

Công Ty Con.description: Subsidiary company, its managers, and legal representatives.<SEP>A subsidiary company is a company that is controlled by a parent company through share ownership or decision-making power.<SEP>Công Ty Con is a subsidiary company that is owned or controlled by a parent company.

Phần Vốn Góp.description: The total value of assets contributed or committed by a member to a limited liability company or partnership.<SEP>Phần Vốn Góp refers to the capital contributions made by the members of a limited liability company.

Sản Phẩm, Dịch Vụ Công Ích.description: Essential products and services for the economic and social life of the country, locality, or community.
