Người Có Liên Qu.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include foreign organizations established abroad under foreign law.

Doanh nghiệp.description:
Doanh nghiệp refers to a business entity in Vietnam that must comply with various legal requirements and regulations. These requirements include the need to notify the registration authority of any changes in its registration content and to undergo registration, receiving a Certificate of Business Registration. Doanh nghiệp must publicly announce its registration information on the National Portal for Business Registration and pay the required fees as stipulated by law. The entity is also required to register its main office, branches, representative offices, and business locations with the appropriate authorities.

Doanh nghiệp must adhere to regulations and procedures for suspension, termination, and dissolution. Before dissolution, it is mandatory for the business to ensure that all debts and financial obligations are settled. The registration and supervision of Doanh nghiệp are carried out by the Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh, the official registration authority in Vietnam.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp refers to a business entity that can be subject to having its registration certificate revoked under certain conditions.

Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.entity_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn is a limited liability company that can have one or more legal representatives.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn is a type of company with limited liability.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn is a type of limited liability company that can be organized under the management structure defined in the law.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn is a limited liability company.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn is a type of limited liability company that a private enterprise can be converted into.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn is a limited liability company that can convert into a joint-stock company.

Công ty cổ phần.description: Công ty cổ phần is a joint-stock company that has legal entity status from the date it is issued a business registration certificate. It can have one or more legal representatives and is organized under the management structure defined by law. As a type of corporation, Công ty cổ phần has the right to issue shares, bonds, and other securities. The registered capital of a Công ty cổ phần is divided into equal parts called shares, and shareholders can be organizations or individuals. Ownership in a Công ty cổ phần is divided into shares, which can be purchased using various forms of payment. Additionally, the company must maintain a register of shareholders to keep track of ownership and rights associated with the shares.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần is a type of company structure where ownership is divided into shares that can be bought and sold.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần is a type of joint-stock company that a private enterprise can be converted into.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần is a joint-stock company that can be formed through the conversion of a limited liability company.<SEP>A type of company that can be converted into a single-member limited liability company.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần is a type of company that can be converted into a công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên.

Điều lệ công ty.description:
Điều lệ công ty, which translates to the company charter or bylaws, is a fundamental document that governs the structure, operations, and responsibilities of a company's management. It specifies the rights and obligations of shareholders and the procedures for managing the company. The document outlines the number, management titles, and responsibilities of the legal representatives, as well as the total value of capital contributions and other relevant information. It also includes the procedures and regulations for maintaining the Sổ Đăng Ký Thành Viên (register of members) and issuing Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp (share contribution certificates).

Điều lệ công ty details the rules and procedures for conducting meetings and making decisions, as well as the procedures for convening meetings and making decisions. It defines the rights and obligations of the Chairman, Board of Members, Director, and General Director, and outlines the responsibilities and rights of the Board of Members. The charter specifies the exact ratio required for passing resolutions or decisions by the Board of Members. Additionally, it may contain specific provisions regarding the nomination of individuals to the Board of Directors and Supervisory Board. Overall, Điều lệ công ty serves as a comprehensive guide that outlines the rights and responsibilities of the company and its owners, ensuring clear governance and operational guidelines. It may also have different regulations regarding the process of obtaining shareholder opinions in writing and specific rules for meetings. Furthermore, it defines the rights and obligations of the Trưởng Ban kiểm soát (Supervisory Board Chairman) and must be published on the company's electronic information site.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty is the company's charter or bylaws that outline the rules and procedures for the company's governance.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty is the company's charter or bylaws that outline the rules and procedures for the company's operations.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty is the charter or bylaws of the company that outlines the rights and obligations of its members.

Trọng tài.description: Trọng tài is an arbitration body that serves as an alternative dispute resolution mechanism where a neutral third party makes a binding decision on disputes. This body can be approached by legal representatives to represent the company in arbitration proceedings. Trọng tài has the authority to issue decisions that can affect the content of the Certificate of Business Registration, including changes to the validity of company resolutions. Specifically, it can review and potentially annul resolutions passed by the Đại hội đồng cổ đông, which is the General Shareholders' Meeting. Thus, Trọng tài plays a crucial role in resolving conflicts and ensuring the legality and validity of business decisions and registrations.<SEP>Trọng tài refers to the process of arbitration used to resolve disputes.<SEP>Trọng tài is the arbitration body involved in the dispute resolution process.

Hội đồng quản trị.description: Hội đồng quản trị, which translates to the Board of Directors, is a governing body in joint-stock companies responsible for managing the company's affairs and making key decisions. This board has the authority to appoint a new legal representative and oversees the timely payment of shares by shareholders. The actions of Hội đồng quản trị can be reviewed by shareholders, ensuring accountability and transparency in the management of the company. As a governing body, Hội đồng quản trị plays a crucial role in the strategic direction and operational oversight of the company it governs. It is responsible for making key decisions and overseeing the management of the company, ensuring that the company operates effectively and in the best interest of its shareholders.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is the board of directors in a company, responsible for managing and overseeing the company's operations.<SEP>The Board of Directors appoints or hires the Director or General Director and oversees their activities.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is a governing body of a company responsible for making decisions and overseeing the management of the company.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is a governing body responsible for managing the company and making important decisions.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is a governing body responsible for managing the company and making important decisions.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is an organizational body within a company, and Kiểm soát viên cannot be a family member of its members.

Chủ sở hữu công ty.description: Chủ sở hữu công ty is the company owner who can appoint a new legal representative.<SEP>The owner of a one-member limited liability company, responsible for the company's financial obligations and has specific rights as defined by law.<SEP>The owner of the company is responsible for the accuracy of the dissolution file.

30 ngày.description: 30 ngày refers to the period during which a legal representative must be present in Việt Nam or appoint a substitute.

Người Nước Ngoài.description: People from other countries who are present in Việt Nam and are subject to certain legal provisions.

Quyền Sở Hữu Trí Tuệ.description: Intellectual property rights are determined by the laws of the country where the intellectual property is sought to be protected.<SEP>Quyền Sở Hữu Trí Tuệ is the legal protection of intellectual property rights as defined by the law.

Thừa Kế.description: Inheritance is determined by the laws of the country where the deceased had citizenship.<SEP>Thừa kế is a legal concept that is determined by the law of the country where the deceased had citizenship immediately before death.

Năng Lực Pháp Luật Dân Sự.entity_id: Năng Lực Pháp Luật Dân Sự
Năng Lực Pháp Luật Dân Sự.description: Civil legal capacity of an individual is determined by the laws of the country where the individual has citizenship.

Năng Lực Hành Vi Dân Sự.entity_id: Năng Lực Hành Vi Dân Sự
Năng Lực Hành Vi Dân Sự.description: Civil conduct capacity of an individual is determined by the laws of the country where the individual has citizenship.

Việc Xác Định Cá Nhân Mất Tích Hoặc Chết.entity_id: Việc Xác Định Cá Nhân Mất Tích Hoặc Chết
Việc Xác Định Cá Nhân Mất Tích Hoặc Chết.description: The determination of a missing or deceased individual is based on the laws of the country where the individual had citizenship at the time of the last known information.

Quyền Sở Hữu Và Quyền Khác Đối Với Tài S.entity_id: Quyền Sở Hữu Và Quyền Khác Đối Với Tài Sản
Quyền Sở Hữu Và Quyền Khác Đối Với Tài S.description: The establishment, exercise, modification, and termination of ownership and other rights over property are determined by the laws of the country where the property is located.

Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật.entity_id: Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật
Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật.description: Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật is a legal representative of a business entity who is responsible for acting in the best interest of the business.<SEP>Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật is the legal representative of the company.

Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền.entity_id: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền
Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền.description: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền is an authorized representative of the owners, members, or shareholders of a company.

Thành Viên.description: Thành Viên is a member of a company who can authorize a representative.<SEP>Thành Viên is a member of the company who has a capital contribution and certain rights within the company.<SEP>Thành Viên refers to the members of a limited liability company, who can be organizations or individuals and are liable for the company's debts within the scope of their capital contributions.

Cổ Đông.description: Cổ Đông is a shareholder of a company who can authorize a representative.<SEP>Cổ Đông refers to the shareholders of the company who must provide updated contact information.<SEP>Cổ Đông is a shareholder of the company who receives dividends and has rights related to the shares they own.<SEP>Cổ Đông refers to shareholders who have the right to request changes in the shareholder register within 24 hours.<SEP>Cổ đông refers to shareholders of a company who have the right to request the court to stop or revoke resolutions or decisions.<SEP>Cổ Đông refers to shareholders who may request the Tòa Án or Trọng Tài to invalidate a resolution of the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông.<SEP>Cổ Đông is a shareholder of a company who holds shares and has the right to participate in the company's decision-making process.

Tổ Chức.description: Tổ Chức is an organization that can be a member or shareholder of a company and authorize representatives.<SEP>An organization that can be a recipient of the transfer of ownership of the company.

Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh.entity_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh, also known as the Business Registration Authority, is a government agency responsible for the registration and management of business entities in Vietnam. This organization reviews and processes changes in business registration content, including the registration of branches, representative offices, and business locations. It is also responsible for issuing the Certificate of Business Registration and reviewing registration documents. Additionally, Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh provides information on business registration content and updates information on changes in registered capital. The authority has the power to reject proposed business names based on specific regulations. It plays a crucial role in ensuring the proper registration and management of businesses within the jurisdiction and updates their legal status in the National Database on Business Registration. The agency is also responsible for registering the conversion of companies and issuing business registration certificates.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is an organization responsible for registering businesses, issuing certificates, managing information systems, and supervising businesses.<SEP>The business registration authority is responsible for announcing the dissolution process and updating the legal status of the business.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is an authority responsible for registering businesses and receiving reports from them.

Cổ đông sáng lập.description: Cổ đông sáng lập refers to the founding shareholders of a company.<SEP>Cổ đông sáng lập are the founding shareholders of a company who have specific rights and obligations.<SEP>Cổ đông sáng lập refers to the founding shareholders of the company.

Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên.entity_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên
Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên.description: The Chairman of the Board of Members, known in Vietnamese as "Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên," is the chairperson of the company's governing body, the Hội đồng thành viên. This individual is responsible for convening and leading meetings, making decisions, and ensuring the company adheres to legal standards and its charter. The Chairman is appointed by the company owner or elected by the board members and plays a crucial role in organizing the collection of opinions and ensuring the accuracy of reports. Additionally, the Chairman is tasked with signing the amended company charter for a partnership company, thereby ensuring the company's legal interests and compliance with the law.<SEP>Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên is the chairperson of the governing body of the company.<SEP>Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên is the chairperson of the board of members.

Thành viên công ty.description: Thành viên công ty refers to the members of a company, who can be individuals or organizations.<SEP>Thành viên công ty are the members of the company who participate in the meetings and vote on decisions.

Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành vi.entity_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên
Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành vi.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên is a type of company with a single member.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên is a type of company with limited liability and only one member.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên is a type of company with a single shareholder, which can be managed in two models: with a Chairman, Director, or General Director, or with a Board of Members, Director, or General Director.<SEP>A company owned by a single entity or individual, responsible for the company's debts within the limit of the registered capital.<SEP>A single-member limited liability company that can be formed by converting a joint-stock company.

Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành vi.entity_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên
Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành vi.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên is a type of company with two or more members.<SEP>A limited liability company with two or more members.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên is a type of company with limited liability and at least two members.<SEP>This type of company is required to disclose information according to specific legal provisions.<SEP>Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên is a type of company that can be formed by converting a công ty cổ phần.

Ban kiểm soát.description: Ban kiểm soát is a supervisory board that must be established in certain state-owned enterprises and companies with state-owned enterprises as shareholders. It is part of the management structure of state-owned enterprises and serves as the Supervisory Board of a company, overseeing the activities of the Board of Directors and the company's operations. The Ban kiểm soát is responsible for reviewing specific issues related to the management and operation of the company upon request by shareholders, acting as an audit committee to ensure oversight and accountability. It oversees the company's financial activities and ensures compliance with regulations. The supervisory board has the right to access information and reports from the company and is responsible for reviewing financial reports and internal controls. Typically, Ban kiểm soát consists of 3 to 5 kiểm soát viên with a term not exceeding 5 years.<SEP>Ban kiểm soát is a supervisory board within a company that reviews and audits the company's activities.<SEP>Ban kiểm soát is a supervisory body within a company that monitors the activities of the management and ensures compliance with regulations.

Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc.entity_id: Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc
Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc.description: Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc refers to the director or general manager of a company. This individual is a senior executive responsible for the day-to-day management and operations of the company. They are appointed or removed by the governing body, which in this context is the Hội đồng quản trị or Board of Directors. The Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc is accountable for managing the company's operations and reporting to the governing body. Additionally, they are responsible for the accuracy of the dissolution file when the company undergoes dissolution.

Biên bản giao nhận tài sản góp vốn.description: The Capital Contribution Asset Transfer Record is a document that includes key information about the transfer of ownership of capital contribution assets.

Chủ doanh nghiệp tư nhân.description: The owner of a private enterprise is responsible for using assets in business activities without the need to transfer ownership to the business.<SEP>Chủ doanh nghiệp tư nhân is the owner of a private enterprise who makes the decision to convert the enterprise into another type of company.<SEP>Chủ doanh nghiệp tư nhân is the owner of a private enterprise who is personally responsible for all debts incurred before the conversion of the enterprise into a company.<SEP>Chủ doanh nghiệp tư nhân is the owner of a private business entity.<SEP>The owner of a private business is responsible for the accuracy of the dissolution file.

Nhà đầu tư nước ngoài.description: Foreign investors are required to conduct transactions through accounts as per foreign exchange management regulations.<SEP>Nhà đầu tư nước ngoài refers to foreign investors.

Phí.description: Phí refers to the fees that must be paid by organizations and individuals for various services related to business registration and information provision.

Quyền sử dụng đất.description: Quyền sử dụng đất refers to the rights to use land as a form of capital contribution.<SEP>Quyền sử dụng đất refers to the right to use land as a form of payment.

Công nghệ.description: Công nghệ refers to technology that can be used as a capital contribution asset.<SEP>Công nghệ refers to technology used as a form of payment.

Bí quyết kỹ thuật.description: Bí quyết kỹ thuật refers to trade secrets that can be used as capital contribution assets.<SEP>Bí quyết kỹ thuật refers to technical know-how used as a form of payment.

Lệ phí trước bạ.description: Lệ phí trước bạ refers to the stamp duty that is not applicable when transferring ownership of capital contribution assets.

Chuyển nhượng cổ phần.description: Chuyển nhượng cổ phần refers to the transfer of shares, which must be conducted through accounts as per foreign exchange management regulations.

Nhận cổ tức.description: Nhận cổ tức refers to the receipt of dividends, which must be conducted through accounts as per foreign exchange management regulations.

Chuyển lợi nhuận ra nước ngoài.entity_id: Chuyển lợi nhuận ra nước ngoài
Chuyển lợi nhuận ra nước ngoài.description: Chuyển lợi nhuận ra nước ngoài refers to the transfer of profits to foreign countries, which must be conducted through accounts as per foreign exchange management regulations.

Tổ chức, cá nhân.description: Organizations and individuals must pay fees for requesting information on business registration content.

Giấy chứng nhận phần vốn góp.entity_id: Giấy chứng nhận phần vốn góp
Giấy chứng nhận phần vốn góp.description: Certificate of capital contribution.<SEP>Giấy chứng nhận phần vốn góp is a document that certifies the contribution of capital by a member to the company.

Người góp vốn.description: Capital contributor who becomes a member of the company after contributing capital.<SEP>Người góp vốn refers to the person who contributes assets to capital and is involved in the valuation process.<SEP>Người góp vốn refers to individuals who contribute capital to become shareholders of a company after paying for their shares.

Trái phiếu.description: Bonds that can be issued by a limited liability company with two or more members.<SEP>Bonds issued by the company, subject to legal regulations.<SEP>Trái phiếu refers to bonds and other securities that a company can issue.<SEP>Trái phiếu refers to bonds issued by a company that can be converted into shares.

Thủ tục hành chính.description: Administrative procedures for transferring ownership of contributed assets.

Giấy tờ pháp lý.description: Legal documents required for the registration of a business and the issuance of capital contribution certificates.

Sổ Đăng Ký Thành Viên.description: Sổ Đăng Ký Thành Viên is a register maintained by a company to record the ownership of capital contributions by its members, which can be in the form of paper documents or electronic data.

Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp.entity_id: Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp
Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp.description: Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp is a certificate issued by a company to its members, indicating their capital contribution.

Hội Đồng Thành Viên.description: Hội Đồng Thành Viên is a body within a company that has the authority to make decisions and has members with specific rights and responsibilities.<SEP>Hội Đồng Thành Viên is the governing body of a company, consisting of all members, and has the authority to make decisions on all business matters of the company.<SEP>The board of members responsible for making decisions to divide a company.<SEP>The Board of Members is responsible for passing resolutions and decisions to split the company.<SEP>Hội Đồng Thành Viên is the board of members that makes decisions and oversees the company's operations.

Công Ty.description: Công Ty is a legal entity that maintains the Sổ Đăng Ký Thành Viên, which records shareholder information, and issues Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp to its members. As a company, it is subject to its charter and the laws of the jurisdiction in which it operates. The company is responsible for updating shareholder information and managing the sale of shares. It must comply with regulations regarding the repurchase and payment of shares, as well as the issuance and transfer of private bonds. Additionally, Công Ty has the authority to increase the number of shares and sell them to existing shareholders. The company has a structured organizational framework, including shareholders and a board of directors, and is governed by specific regulations that define its management and operations. Members of the company have rights and obligations within this structure.

Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên.entity_id: Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên
Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên.description: Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên is the chairperson of the Hội Đồng Thành Viên.<SEP>Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên is the chairperson of the governing body of a company, responsible for convening meetings and making decisions on business matters.<SEP>The Chairman of the Board of Members is elected or appointed by the members of the new company.

Giám Đốc.description: Giám Đốc is the director or manager of a company, responsible for overseeing the company's operations and making strategic decisions. This senior management position is appointed by the Hội Đồng Quản Trị, which translates to the Board of Directors, to manage the daily business operations. The role of Giám Đốc involves ensuring that the company's operations run smoothly and that strategic decisions are made effectively. Additionally, the position requires the director to separate personal expenses from the company's finances, maintaining a clear distinction between personal and professional financial matters. The Giám Đốc can be appointed or elected by the governing body or members of the company, emphasizing the importance of the role in the overall management and success of the organization.

Tổng Giám Đốc.description: Tổng Giám Đốc, which translates to General Director, is a senior management position within a company. This individual is appointed by the Hội Đồng Quản Trị, or the Board of Directors, to oversee daily business operations and make strategic decisions. The General Director is responsible for the company's operations and management, ensuring that personal expenses are separated from the company's financial activities. This role involves managing the company's operations and making key strategic decisions that impact the company's direction and success. The General Director may be appointed or elected by the governing body of the company, reflecting the importance of this position in the overall governance and operational success of the organization.

Người Quản Lý Khác.description: Người Quản Lý Khác refers to other managers within the company.<SEP>Người Quản Lý Khác refers to other management personnel within a company who are responsible for overseeing specific areas or departments.

Hội đồng Thành viên.description: Hội đồng Thành viên is a governing body within a company responsible for making decisions and overseeing the company's operations.<SEP>Hội đồng Thành viên is a governing body within a company that makes decisions and passes resolutions.

Nghị quyết.description: Nghị quyết refers to the resolutions or decisions made by the governing bodies of a company, such as the Hội đồng Thành viên (Board of Members) or the Đại hội đồng cổ đông (General Shareholders' Meeting). These resolutions cover a range of topics, including changes in the company's capital. A Nghị quyết can also be passed through written shareholder opinions, which hold the same value as those passed during the General Shareholders' Meeting. Once a resolution is passed, it must be communicated to the shareholders within 15 days after the vote concludes and can be published on the company's electronic information page.<SEP>Nghị quyết is a resolution or decision document used in the process of dissolving a business entity.

Quyền và Nghĩa vụ.description: Quyền và Nghĩa vụ refers to the rights and obligations of the members of the company as defined by the law and the company's charter.

Sổ đăng ký thành viên.description: Sổ đăng ký thành viên is the register that records the information of the company members.

Nghĩa vụ của thành viên Hội đồng thành v.entity_id: Nghĩa vụ của thành viên Hội đồng thành viên
Nghĩa vụ của thành viên Hội đồng thành v.description: Nghĩa vụ của thành viên Hội đồng thành viên refers to the obligations of the members of the Board of Members as defined in the law.

Mua lại phần vốn góp.description: Mua lại phần vốn góp refers to the process of a company repurchasing a member's share of capital.

Chuyển nhượng phần vốn góp.description: Chuyển nhượng phần vốn góp refers to the transfer of a member's share of capital to another party.

Chủ tịch Hội đồng Thành viên.entity_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng Thành viên
Chủ tịch Hội đồng Thành viên.description: Chủ tịch Hội đồng Thành viên is the chairperson of the company's governing body, responsible for convening meetings.

Cuộc họp Hội đồng Thành viên.entity_id: Cuộc họp Hội đồng Thành viên
Cuộc họp Hội đồng Thành viên.description: Cuộc họp Hội đồng Thành viên refers to the meetings held by the governing body of a company to make decisions and pass resolutions.

Nghị quyết, quyết định.description: Nghị quyết, quyết định are the resolutions and decisions made by the governing body of a company.<SEP>Nghị quyết, quyết định are the resolutions and decisions made by the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>Nghị quyết, quyết định refers to resolutions or decisions made by the Board of Members, which can be passed through written ballots if approved by members holding at least 65% of the company's charter capital.

Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm.entity_id: Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm
Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm.description: Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm is the annual financial report of the company that is approved by the governing body.<SEP>Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm is the annual financial report of the company.<SEP>Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm refers to annual financial reports submitted to the governing body.<SEP>Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm is the annual financial report of a company that includes information on the company's financial performance and position.<SEP>Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm is the annual financial report of the company.

Tổ chức lại, giải thể công ty.entity_id: Tổ chức lại, giải thể công ty
Tổ chức lại, giải thể công ty.description: Tổ chức lại, giải thể công ty refers to the restructuring or dissolution of the company, which requires a resolution by the governing body.

65% Vốn Điều Lệ.description: 65% Vốn Điều Lệ is the minimum percentage of capital ownership required for a meeting to be valid.

50% Vốn Điều Lệ.description: 50% Vốn Điều Lệ is the minimum percentage of capital ownership required for the second meeting to be valid.

75% Vốn Điều Lệ.description: 75% Vốn Điều Lệ is the minimum percentage of capital ownership required for certain critical decisions to be valid.

Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh.entity_id: Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh
Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh.description: Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh is the authority responsible for approving or rejecting the proposed names of businesses.<SEP>Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh is the authority responsible for registering businesses and their activities.<SEP>The agency responsible for registering businesses and updating the national database.<SEP>The Business Registration Authority is responsible for registering the new companies and updating the legal status of the company being split.

Tên Doanh Nghiệp.description: Tên Doanh Nghiệp is the name of a business entity, which must be unique and cannot overlap with existing names.

Tên Viết Tắt.description: Tên Viết Tắt is the abbreviated name of a business entity, derived from its full Vietnamese name or its foreign language name.

Tên Chi Nhánh.description: Tên Chi Nhánh is the name of a branch of a business entity, which must include the name of the business and the term "Chi nhánh".

Tên Văn Phòng Đại Diện.description: Tên Văn Phòng Đại Diện is the name of a representative office of a business entity, which must include the name of the business and the term "Văn phòng đại diện".

Tên Địa Điểm Kinh Doanh.description: Tên Địa Điểm Kinh Doanh is the name of a business location, which must include the name of the business and the term "Địa điểm kinh doanh".

Tên Trùng.description: Tên Trùng refers to identical names of business entities, which are prohibited.

Tên Gây Nhầm Lẫn.description: Tên Gây Nhầm Lẫn refers to names that are similar to existing business names, which are also prohibited.

Điều 38.description: Điều 38 is a regulation that outlines the prohibitions on naming businesses, including the use of names that are identical or confusingly similar to existing business names.

Điều 39.description: Điều 39 is a regulation that specifies the rules for naming businesses in foreign languages and the use of abbreviated names.

Điều 40.description: Điều 40 is a regulation that outlines the naming rules for branches, representative offices, and business locations.

Điều 41.description: Đиều 41 is a regulation that defines what constitutes identical and confusingly similar business names.<SEP>Điều 41 is a regulation that outlines the procedures for forming an arbitration panel and appointing arbitrators.

Điều 40.description: Điều 40 outlines the naming rules for branches, representative offices, and business locations.

Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Vi.entity_id: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Viên Trở Lên
Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Vi.description: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Viên Trở Lên is a limited liability company with 2 to 50 members, which can be organizations or individuals, and has legal entity status from the date of receiving the business registration certificate.

Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Hoạt Động Chi Nh.entity_id: Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Hoạt Động Chi Nhánh
Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Hoạt Động Chi Nh.description: Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Hoạt Động Chi Nhánh is a certificate for registering the activities of a branch or representative office.

Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Doanh Nghiệp.entity_id: Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Doanh Nghiệp
Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Doanh Nghiệp.description: Giấy Chứng Nhận Đăng Ký Doanh Nghiệp is a business registration certificate that grants legal entity status to a limited liability company.

Dấu.description: Dấu is a seal or digital signature used by a business entity in transactions, the type, quantity, form, and content of which are determined by the business entity.

Chi nhánh.description: Chi nhánh is a branch of a business entity that performs all or part of the business entity's functions, including representation.<SEP>Chi nhánh refers to branches of a business that can be terminated by the business itself or by the government.<SEP>Chi nhánh is a branch of a foreign arbitration organization operating in Vietnam.<SEP>Chi nhánh is a branch of a foreign arbitration organization established in Vietnam.

Địa điểm kinh doanh.description: Địa điểm kinh doanh is the location where a business entity conducts specific business activities.<SEP>Địa điểm kinh doanh refers to business locations that can be terminated by the business itself or by the government.

Hồ sơ đăng ký hoạt động.entity_id: Hồ sơ đăng ký hoạt động
Hồ sơ đăng ký hoạt động.description: Hồ sơ đăng ký hoạt động is the registration file submitted by a business entity to the registration authority for the establishment of branches or representative offices.

Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký hoạt động.entity_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký hoạt động
Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký hoạt động.description: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký hoạt động is the registration certificate issued by the registration authority to a business entity for the establishment of branches or representative offices.

Công ty.description:
Công ty refers to a business entity that operates under a defined governance structure and is subject to various legal and regulatory requirements. It has a governing body responsible for convening meetings and making decisions. The company can adjust its registered capital, either by increasing or decreasing it, and distribute profits to its members. The management structure of Công ty includes one or more Deputy Directors or Deputy General Directors, whose number and authority are specified in the company's charter. The responsibilities of the managers and representatives of the company are clearly defined, ensuring that the entity operates in accordance with its governance principles.

Công ty is also required to comply with legal obligations, such as publishing regular and abnormal information as mandated by law. Additionally, the company must disclose contracts and related transactions as per the relevant laws. The regulations that govern Công ty include provisions for the payment of dividends and the overall management structure, ensuring transparency and accountability in its operations.<SEP>Công ty is a business entity, and Kiểm soát viên can be a manager or employee of the company unless the company's charter specifies otherwise.<SEP>Công ty is a business entity that can accept new members and is subject to the regulations outlined in the text.<SEP>Công ty is an entity that can inherit rights and obligations from a private enterprise upon conversion.

Chi phí hợp lý.description: Chi phí hợp lý refers to the reasonable costs associated with convening and conducting meetings of the company's governing body.

Kiến nghị.description: Kiến nghị refers to the proposals or suggestions made by members to add items to the agenda of the company's governing body meetings.<SEP>Kiến nghị refers to proposals submitted by shareholders or groups of shareholders to be included in the agenda of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Kiến nghị refers to proposals or suggestions that must be included in the agenda and content of the meeting, unless specified otherwise.

Thông báo mời họp.description: Thông báo mời họp refers to the notice or invitation sent to members to attend meetings of the company's governing body.<SEP>The meeting invitation notice is a document that must be stored at the main office of the company along with the minutes of the meeting and resolutions.

Điều 36.description: Điều 36 is a regulation concerning the valuation of assets contributed to capital.

Điều 37.description: Điều 37 is a regulation concerning the naming of businesses.

Nguyên tắc đồng thuận.description: Nguyên tắc đồng thuận is a principle of consensus used in the valuation of assets contributed to capital.

Tổ chức thẩm định giá.description: Tổ chức thẩm định giá is an organization responsible for valuing assets contributed to capital.<SEP>Tổ chức thẩm định giá is an organization that provides valuation services.

Tài liệu họp.description: Tài liệu họp refers to the documents and materials used during meetings of the company's governing body.

Đồng Việt Nam.description: Đồng Việt Nam is the national currency of Vietnam.<SEP>Đồng Việt Nam is the national currency of Vietnam used for transactions.

Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi.entity_id: Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi
Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi.description: Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi refers to freely convertible foreign currencies.<SEP>Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi refers to freely convertible foreign currencies used for transactions.

Vàng.description: Vàng refers to gold, which is subject to valuation regulations.<SEP>Vàng refers to gold used as a form of payment.

Tên doanh nghiệp.description: Điều 37 regulates the naming of businesses.

Chủ Sở Hữu Công Ty.description: The owner of the company has rights and obligations as defined by the law, including contributing capital, making business decisions, and managing internal affairs.<SEP>The owner of a company who can decide on the increase or decrease of the registered capital.<SEP>The owner of a company who can make decisions to divide the company.

Chủ Tịch Công Ty.description: The Chairman of the company is a position that the owner must separate personal expenses from.<SEP>The Chairman of the Company is elected or appointed by the members of the new company.

Điều Lê Công Ty.description: The company charter is a document that the owner must comply with and can specify different rules for internal management.

Người Đại Diện.description: A representative who can act on behalf of the owner if they are incapacitated or have limited legal capacity.<SEP>Người Đại Diện is the representative of a party in the dispute resolution meeting.

Chủ tịch công ty.description: Chủ tịch công ty is the chairman of the company, one of the roles that can be held by a person representing the company legally.<SEP>Chủ tịch công ty is the chairman of the company who is part of the management structure of state-owned enterprises.<SEP>The Chairman of the company is appointed by the company owner and acts on behalf of the owner and the company, except for the rights and obligations of the General Director or CEO.<SEP>Chủ tịch công ty is the Chairman of a company.<SEP>The Chairman of the company is appointed by the representative body of the owner and has a term of no more than 5 years, with the possibility of reappointment.<SEP>Chủ tịch công ty is the chairman of the company, responsible for leading and managing the company.

Giám đốc.description: Giám đốc is the director of a company, a leadership position within the organization responsible for managing the daily business operations. This role is held by a person who represents the company legally and is part of the management structure, particularly in state-owned enterprises. The Director is appointed by the Board of Members or the Chairman of the company and is tasked with ensuring the company's legal interests and adherence to the law and the company's charter. The position requires specific qualifications, and the individual cannot be related to certain company officials. The Hội đồng thành viên, or Board of Members, can request information from the Giám đốc, highlighting the role's accountability and transparency requirements. Overall, the Giám đốc plays a crucial role in the governance and operational management of the company.<SEP>Giám đốc is a senior manager in a company who is responsible for the overall management and operations of the company.<SEP>Giám đốc is a position within a company, and Kiểm soát viên cannot be a family member of the Giám đốc.

Tổng giám đốc.description:
Tổng giám đốc, which translates to General Director, is a leadership position within a company, particularly in state-owned enterprises. This role is held by an individual who represents the company legally and is appointed by the Board of Members or the Chairman of the company. The General Director is responsible for managing the company's daily business operations and ensuring that the company's legal interests are protected while adhering to the law and the company's charter.

The General Director must meet specific qualifications and cannot have certain relationships with other company officials. Additionally, the General Director can be requested to provide information by the Hội đồng thành viên, which is the Board of Members. This position involves specific duties and responsibilities that are crucial for the effective operation and legal compliance of the company.<SEP>Tổng giám đốc is the highest-ranking executive in a company, responsible for making major corporate decisions and managing the overall operations of the company.<SEP>Tổng giám đốc is a senior management position within a company, and Kiểm soát viên cannot be a family member of the Tổng giám đốc.

Kiểm soát viên.description: Kiểm soát viên is a member of the Ban kiểm soát, also known as the Supervisory Board, responsible for overseeing the company's operations and ensuring compliance with the law, the company charter, and the decisions of the company owner. This position involves supervising and controlling the company's operations, ensuring the company's legal interests, and adhering to regulations. Kiểm soát viên must meet specific qualifications and cannot be related to certain company officials. As a member of the Supervisory Board, the Kiểm soát viên has the right to attend Board meetings, discuss matters, and access information and reports from the company, although they do not have the right to vote. Their role is crucial in ensuring that the company operates within legal and regulatory frameworks and that the company's interests are protected.<SEP>Kiểm soát viên is a member of the Ban kiểm soát with a term not exceeding 5 years and can be re-elected without limitation.<SEP>Kiểm soát viên is a role within a company responsible for monitoring and ensuring compliance with regulations and duties.<SEP>Kiểm soát viên is a position with specific qualifications and responsibilities, including continuing duties until a new Kiểm soát viên is elected.

cá nhân.description: A cá nhân refers to an individual who may be prohibited from certain activities or businesses by the court.<SEP>cá nhân refers to an individual who may be subject to legal penalties for violating regulations.

pháp nhân thương mại.description: A pháp nhân thương mại is a commercial legal entity that may be prohibited from certain business activities by the court.

Điều 78.description: The owner of the company has rights and obligations in special circumstances as outlined in Article 78, such as transfer of ownership or incapacitation.

Chi phí khởi kiện.description: The costs associated with initiating a lawsuit, which may be covered by the company under certain conditions.

Quyền của chủ sở hữu công ty.entity_id: Quyền của chủ sở hữu công ty
Quyền của chủ sở hữu công ty.description: The rights of the company owner, which include decision-making powers over various aspects of the company's operations.

Trình tự, thủ tục khởi kiện.entity_id: Trình tự, thủ tục khởi kiện
Trình tự, thủ tục khởi kiện.description: The sequence and procedures for initiating a lawsuit are governed by civil litigation laws.

Pháp luật về tố tụng dân sự.entity_id: Pháp luật về tố tụng dân sự
Pháp luật về tố tụng dân sự.description: The legal framework governing civil litigation procedures.

Bị bác yêu cầu khởi kiện.entity_id: Bị bác yêu cầu khởi kiện
Bị bác yêu cầu khởi kiện.description: The scenario where a lawsuit request is rejected.

Công ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Một Thành Vi.entity_id: Công ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Một Thành Viên

Trụ sở chính của công ty.entity_id: Trụ sở chính của công ty
Trụ sở chính của công ty.description: The main headquarters of the company where notifications are collected and stored.<SEP>The main office of the company is where certain documents such as the minutes of the meeting and resolutions are stored.<SEP>Trụ sở chính của công ty is the main office of the company where the documents related to the shareholder opinion process are stored.<SEP>Trụ sở chính của công ty is the main office or headquarters of the company where certain reports must be stored.

Sổ ghi chép.description: Sổ ghi chép refers to record-keeping books that are checked and monitored by the Board of Members.

Giao dịch.description: Giao dịch refers to transactions that are checked and monitored by the Board of Members.<SEP>Giao dịch refers to transactions that are part of the company's operations and are subject to compensation for any losses incurred.<SEP>Giao dịch is a transaction.

Sổ kế toán.description: Sổ kế toán refers to accounting books that are checked and monitored by the Board of Members.<SEP>Sổ kế toán is the accounting ledger or record.<SEP>Sổ kế toán is the accounting ledger of the company.

Báo cáo tài chính.description: Báo cáo tài chính refers to the financial reports of a company, which provide detailed information about the company's financial performance and position. These reports are essential documents that offer an overview of the company's financial status and are typically prepared on an annual basis. The preparation and submission of Báo cáo tài chính are subject to monitoring and oversight by the Board of Members and the Audit Committee. In certain circumstances, such as when a company is reducing its registered capital, Báo cáo tài chính must be included in the relevant documentation. Additionally, these financial reports must be submitted to the Đại hội đồng cổ đông and, if required by law, must be audited to ensure accuracy and compliance with financial regulations.<SEP>Báo cáo tài chính is a financial report that provides information about the company's financial performance and position.

Người ghi biên bản.description: Người ghi biên bản refers to the person responsible for recording the minutes of the meeting.

Quy chế quản lý nội bộ.description: Quy chế quản lý nội bộ refers to internal management regulations of the company.<SEP>Internal management regulations proposed by the Director or General Director.

Cổ phần phổ thông.description: Cổ phần phổ thông are common shares in a company, and the owners of these shares are common shareholders.<SEP>Cổ phần phổ thông is a type of common stock used as the underlying asset for issuing non-voting deposit certificates.<SEP>Cổ phần phổ thông refers to common shares in a company.

Cổ phần ưu đãi.description: Cổ phần ưu đãi are preferred shares in a company, and the owners of these shares are preferred shareholders. These shares can include dividend preferred shares, redemption preferred shares, voting preferred shares, and other types of preferred shares as defined by the company's charter and securities law.<SEP>Cổ phần ưu đãi refers to preferred shares in a company.<SEP>Cổ phần ưu đãi refers to preferred shares that have special rights and privileges.

Chứng chỉ lưu ký không có quyền biểu quy.entity_id: Chứng chỉ lưu ký không có quyền biểu quyết
Chứng chỉ lưu ký không có quyền biểu quy.description: Chứng chỉ lưu ký không có quyền biểu quyết are non-voting depositary receipts that are based on common shares and have economic benefits and corresponding obligations, but lack voting rights.<SEP>Non-voting deposit certificates have economic benefits and corresponding obligations equivalent to common stock, except for voting rights.

Chính phủ.description:
Chính phủ refers to the government of Vietnam, which plays a significant role in regulating various aspects of business and organizational activities within the country. It is responsible for providing detailed regulations concerning non-voting depositary receipts, legal articles, and the organizational structure of the Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh (Business Registration Agency). The government also authorizes certain organizations to hold special shares and defines the system of organization for the Business Registration Agency, including the registration and operation of household businesses.

Furthermore, Chính phủ sets the procedures for revoking business registration certificates and specifies the detailed procedures for the dissolution of a business. These regulations and procedures are crucial for maintaining order and ensuring compliance with legal standards in Vietnam's business environment.<SEP>Chính phủ is the government body that defines the procedures for revoking business registration certificates.

Người được quyền mua cổ phần ưu đãi.entity_id: Người được quyền mua cổ phần ưu đãi

Phó giám đốc.description: Phó giám đốc is a Deputy Director of a company.<SEP>Phó giám đốc is a person in a leadership position within the company who can be requested to provide information by the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>The Deputy Director is a position within the company, with the number and authority defined in the company's charter.

Phó Tổng giám đốc.description: Phó Tổng giám đốc is a Deputy General Director of a company.<SEP>Phó Tổng giám đốc is a person in a leadership position within the company who can be requested to provide information by the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>The Deputy General Director is a position within the company, with the number and authority defined in the company's charter.

Kế toán trưởng.description: Kế toán trưởng is the Chief Accountant of a company.<SEP>Kế toán trưởng is a person in a leadership position within the company who can be requested to provide information by the Hội đồng thành viên.

Trưởng Ban kiểm soát.description: Trưởng Ban kiểm soát is the Head of the Supervisory Board of a company.<SEP>Trưởng Ban kiểm soát is a position responsible for supervising and controlling the company's operations.<SEP>Trưởng Ban kiểm soát is the head of the supervisory board who may preside over the meeting if the chairperson is absent.<SEP>Trưởng Ban kiểm soát is the head of the Ban kiểm soát, elected from among the kiểm soát viên, and must have a university degree in economics, finance, accounting, auditing, law, business administration, or a related field.

Cổ đông phổ thông.description: Common shareholders have the right to attend, speak, and vote at the General Shareholders' Meeting, receive dividends, and have other rights as specified by the company's articles of association and laws.<SEP>Cổ đông phổ thông refers to common shareholders who have certain rights, including the right to nominate individuals to the Board of Directors and Supervisory Board.

Đề nghị của cổ đông.description: Đề nghị của cổ đông refers to the request made by shareholders regarding lost, damaged, or destroyed shares and the responsibility for any disputes arising from the issuance of new shares.

Tổ chức khác.description: Tổ chức khác refers to other organizations that may have the function of maintaining the shareholder register.

Cổ tức.description: Dividends are payments made to shareholders based on the decisions of the General Shareholders' Meeting.<SEP>Cổ tức refers to dividends paid to shareholders of a company.

Cổ phiếu.description: Cổ phiếu is a share certificate issued by a company.

Doanh nghiệp nhà nước.description: Doanh nghiệp nhà nước is a state-owned enterprise.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp nhà nước is a state-owned enterprise with specific regulations regarding supervisors.<SEP>State-owned enterprises that must meet certain standards and conditions.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp nhà nước is a state-owned enterprise with specific regulations for the position of Kiểm soát viên.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp nhà nước is a state-owned enterprise that can convert into a joint-stock company.

Người đại diện phần vốn góp.description: Người đại diện phần vốn góp is a person representing the company's share in another business and can be requested to provide information by the Hội đồng thành viên.

Chuyên gia tư vấn.description: Chuyên gia tư vấn are experts who can be consulted by the Hội đồng thành viên before making important decisions.

Biên bản.description: Biên bản is a document that records the details of a meeting, including time, location, purpose, agenda, attendees, discussions, voting results, and decisions made.<SEP>Biên bản is the minutes or records of meetings.

Cổ phần.description: Cổ phần refers to shares in the company that shareholders can purchase and hold.<SEP>Cổ phần refers to shares of a corporation, which can be sold, registered for purchase, and used to raise capital.<SEP>Cổ phần refers to shares of a company's registered capital, which can be freely transferred by shareholders.<SEP>Cổ phần refers to shares in a company, which can be bought, sold, and transferred.<SEP>Cổ phần refers to shares in a company that can be purchased and sold.<SEP>Cổ phần is a share of stock.

Nguyễn Huy Tưởng.description: Nguyễn Huy Tưởng is a person mentioned in the legal text, likely a member of the board of directors or a legal representative.

Điều 122.description: Điều 122 is a specific article in the law that outlines the rules for the registration of shareholders and their information in the shareholder register.<SEP>Điều 122 is a regulation that specifies the information to be recorded in the shareholder register.

Hội Đồng Quản Trị.description: Hội Đồng Quản Trị is the board of directors of a company, responsible for managing the company's affairs and making key decisions. This includes overseeing the payment of dividends, deciding on the issuance of private bonds if not specified otherwise in the company's charter, and selling remaining shares if they are not fully subscribed by existing shareholders. The board's membership ranges from three to eleven members, with each member serving a term of up to five years. Hội Đồng Quản Trị is the management body of a company, responsible for executing the rights and obligations of the company, except those belonging to the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông. The board is elected or appointed by the members of the company and is responsible for overseeing the company's operations.

Cổ Phần.description: Cổ Phần refers to shares of the company that can be repurchased and paid out to shareholders.

Cổ Phiếu.description: Cổ Phiếu is a certificate that confirms ownership of shares in the company.

Cổ Tức.description: Cổ Tức refers to dividends paid to shareholders based on the company's profits.

Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông.description: Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông, which translates to the General Meeting of Shareholders, is the highest decision-making body of a company, responsible for making major decisions that affect the company. This annual meeting brings together shareholders to discuss and vote on important matters related to the company's operations, including decisions regarding dividends, the issuance of private bonds, and the approval of conditions for selling remaining shares. During the meeting, the board of directors is required to report on the qualifications of independent board members. Additionally, the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông has the authority to make decisions that involve dividing or splitting the company, passing necessary resolutions to effect such changes.

Sổ Kế Toán.description: Sổ Kế Toán is the accounting book where the company records its financial transactions and assets.

Công ty đại chúng.description: Công ty đại chúng is a type of company that is publicly traded and its shares are available to the general public.<SEP>Công ty đại chúng is a publicly traded company that is subject to specific regulations regarding the disclosure and publication of information.<SEP>Publicly traded companies that must meet certain standards and conditions.

Điều 125.description: Điều 125 is a regulation concerning the private placement of shares in a company that is not a publicly traded company.

Điều 126.description: Điều 126 is a regulation concerning the sale of shares in a company.

Điều 127.description: Đيều  127 is a regulation concerning the transfer of shares in a company.

Điều 120.description: Điều 120 is a regulation that specifies restrictions on the transfer of shares.

Trọng Tài.description: Trọng Tài is the arbitration body that can issue a decision affecting the transfer of private bonds.<SEP>Trọng Tài is an arbitration body that can be requested to invalidate a resolution of the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông.

Đиều 130.description: Đиều 130 regulates the decision-making process for issuing private bonds by Công Ty.

Biên bản họp Đại hội đồng cổ đông.entity_id: Biên bản họp Đại hội đồng cổ đông
Biên bản họp Đại hội đồng cổ đông.description: The minutes of the General Shareholders' Meeting must be recorded and can be recorded in audio or electronic form. It must be in Vietnamese and can also be in another language. It includes details such as the name, address, business registration number, time and place of the meeting, agenda, names of the chair and secretary, summary of the meeting, number of shareholders and votes, and the results of the voting.

Phụ lục danh sách cổ đông đăng ký dự họp.entity_id: Phụ lục danh sách cổ đông đăng ký dự họp
Phụ lục danh sách cổ đông đăng ký dự họp.description: The appendix of the list of registered shareholders attending the meeting is a document that must be stored at the main office of the company.

Biên bản kiểm phiếu.description: The voting tally minutes are documents that must be stored at the main office of the company and can be sent to shareholders or posted on the company's electronic information page.<SEP>Biên bản kiểm phiếu is a document that records the results of a vote and must be sent to shareholders within 15 days after the vote concludes.

Tài liệu có liên quan.description: Related documents are those that must be stored at the main office of the company along with the minutes of the meeting and resolutions.

Nhóm cổ đông.description: A group of shareholders is a collective of individuals who have the right to participate in the General Shareholders' Meeting and can request the court or arbitration to review and potentially annul a resolution of the meeting.

Trang thông tin điện tử.description: Trang thông tin điện tử is the electronic information page of the company where the Biên bản kiểm phiếu and Nghị quyết can be published.<SEP>Trang thông tin điện tử is the company's electronic information website where meeting materials can be posted.

Thẩm quyền và thể thức lấy ý kiến cổ đôn.description: Điều lệ công ty may have different regulations regarding the process of obtaining shareholder opinions in writing.

Danh sách cổ đông.description: Danh sách cổ đông is a list of shareholders who have the right to attend the Đại hội đồng cổ đông, containing personal and organizational details.

Giải thể công ty.description: Giải thể công ty refers to the process of dissolving the company.<SEP>Giải thể công ty refers to the dissolution or liquidation of the company.

Biểu quyết.description: Biểu quyết is the process of voting to make decisions at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Biểu quyết is the voting process conducted during the meeting to make decisions.

Bầu dồn phiếu.description: Bầu dồn phiếu is a voting method where shareholders can allocate their votes to one or more candidates.

Người triệu tập họp.description: Người triệu tập họp is the person responsible for organizing and convening the meeting of the shareholders.<SEP>Người triệu tập họp is the person who calls the meeting and may have certain rights during the meeting.

Chương trình họp.description: Chương trình họp is the agenda for the meeting, detailing the topics to be discussed and the order of business.<SEP>Chương trình họp is the agenda of the meeting that outlines the topics to be discussed.

Dự thảo nghị quyết.description: Dự thảo nghị quyết is a draft resolution that will be discussed and voted on during the meeting.

Phiếu biểu quyết.description: Phiếu biểu quyết is a voting ballot used by shareholders to cast their votes on matters discussed at the meeting.<SEP>Voting ballots are used by Board of Directors members to cast their votes.

Văn bản ủy quyền.description: Văn bản ủy quyền is a written authorization document that allows a shareholder to delegate their voting rights to another person or organization.

Phương thức gửi.description: Phương thức gửi refers to the methods used to deliver meeting notifications, including electronic and physical means.

Đăng báo.description: Đăng báo refers to the method of publishing meeting notifications in newspapers, as required by the company's charter.

Tài sản khác.description: Tài sản khác refers to other assets used as a form of payment.

Thời hạn 10 ngày.description: Thời hạn 10 ngày refers to the 10-day period within which a company must register changes to its capital after converting bonds into shares.

Thời hạn 30 ngày.description: Thời hạn 30 ngày refers to the 30-day period within which a decision to repurchase shares must be communicated to all shareholders.<SEP>Thời hạn 30 ngày refers to the 30-day period within which certain actions related to arbitration decisions must be taken.

Thời hạn 90 ngày.description: Thời hạn 90 ngày refers to the 90-day period within which a company must repurchase shares after receiving a shareholder's request.

Thời hạn 12 tháng.description: Thời hạn 12 tháng refers to the 12-month period within which the board of directors can decide to repurchase up to 10% of the shares of each type.

Quy định.description: Quy định refers to the rules or regulations set forth in the company's charter or bylaws.

Tổ chức lại.description: Tổ chức lại refers to restructuring the company.

Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị.description: Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị is the chairperson of the board of directors who presides over the meeting of the shareholders.<SEP>The Chairman of the Board of Directors is responsible for convening and chairing meetings of the Board.<SEP>Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị is the chairperson of the board of directors, responsible for leading and managing the board's activities.<SEP>Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị is the chairperson of the board of directors.

Thư ký cuộc họp.description: Thư ký cuộc họp is the secretary of the meeting who records the proceedings.

Ban kiểm phiếu.description: Ban kiểm phiếu is the counting committee responsible for counting votes during the meeting.

Quy chế quản trị nội bộ.description: Quy chế quản trị nội bộ refers to the internal governance regulations of a company, which outline the procedures and responsibilities for managing the company.

Quy chế hoạt động Hội đồng quản trị.description: Quy chế hoạt động Hội đồng quản trị refers to the regulations governing the operations of the board of directors, which outline the procedures and responsibilities for the board's activities.

Công ty kiểm toán độc lập.entity_id: Công ty kiểm toán độc lập
Công ty kiểm toán độc lập.description: Công ty kiểm toán độc lập refers to an independent auditing firm that is responsible for conducting audits of a company's financial activities.<SEP>The Independent Audit Firm is responsible for auditing the company and ensuring its independence and objectivity.<SEP>Công ty kiểm toán độc lập is an independent auditing firm hired to audit the company's financial reports.

Trường hợp chi trả cổ tức bằng cổ phần.entity_id: Trường hợp chi trả cổ tức bằng cổ phần
Trường hợp chi trả cổ tức bằng cổ phần.description: Trường hợp chi trả cổ tức bằng cổ phần refers to the scenario where dividends are paid in the form of shares, and the company is not required to follow the procedures for selling shares as outlined in the law.

Tăng vốn điều lệ.description: Tăng vốn điều lệ refers to the process of increasing the registered capital of a company by registering the total face value of the shares used for dividend payment within 10 days after the dividend payment is completed.

Quy định tại các điều 123, 124 và 125 củ.entity_id: Quy định tại các điều 123, 124 và 125 của Luật này
Quy định tại các điều 123, 124 và 125 củ.description: Quy định tại các điều 123, 124 và 125 of the Law refers to the specific regulations outlined in Articles 123, 124, and 125 of the law that govern the procedures for selling shares.

Thành viên độc lập.description: Thành viên độc lập refers to independent members of the board of directors who are required to be at least 20% of the board members in certain company structures.<SEP>Thành viên độc lập refers to independent members of the Hội đồng quản trị who are not involved in the company's management.

Ủy ban kiểm toán.description: Ủy ban kiểm toán is the audit committee that is directly under the board of directors and is responsible for overseeing the financial activities of the company.<SEP>The Audit Committee has the authority and responsibilities related to financial reporting, internal control systems, and risk management.<SEP>Ủy ban kiểm toán is a specialized committee under the Hội đồng quản trị responsible for auditing and monitoring the company's financial reports and internal controls.

Thư ký công ty.description: The secretary of the company has the responsibility to support the organization of meetings and record minutes.<SEP>Thư ký công ty is a company secretary who assists in organizing meetings and recording minutes.

Điều kiện quy định tại khoản 1 Điều 27 c.description: Điều kiện quy định tại khoản 1 Điều 27 của Luật này refers to the conditions specified in Article 27, Clause 1 of the Law that a private enterprise must meet to be converted into another type of company.

Nợ thuế.description: Nợ thuế refers to tax debts that the company must take responsibility for after conversion.

Công ty được chuyển đổi.description: Công ty được chuyển đổi inherits and continues to fulfill the labor contracts of the private enterprise.

Công Ty Bị Tách.description: The company being split is required to register changes in its charter capital, number of members, and shareholders, and to register the new companies formed.

Công Ty Được Tách.description: The new companies formed as a result of splitting the original company.

Công Ty Được T_ách.description: The new company elects or appoints the Director.

Điều 206.description: Điều 206 is a regulation concerning the temporary suspension, cessation, and termination of business operations.

Ngành, nghề kinh doanh có điều kiện.entity_id: Ngành, nghề kinh doanh có điều kiện
Ngành, nghề kinh doanh có điều kiện.description: Ngành, nghề kinh doanh có điều kiện refers to regulated industries and professions that require specific qualifications or conditions to operate.

Quản lý thuế.description: Quản lý thuế is a concept related to tax management and compliance.

Môi trường.description: Môi trường is a concept related to environmental regulations and compliance.

Hợp đồng đã ký.description: Hợp đồng đã ký refers to contracts that have been signed with customers and employees.

Thủ tục chuyển đổi loại hình doanh nghiệ.entity_id: Thủ tục chuyển đổi loại hình doanh nghiệp
